title: Senior Helpdesk Engineer
description:
HOW TO APPLY:



If you feel this position aligns with your skills and experience, please fill out the application form here:


/bepartofourteam.





We’re looking for a hands-on senior IT professional who can support clients at all levels while also leading or assisting with IT projects and driving innovative solutions.

Our senior tea
mbers are critical to supporting our awesome clients and their users. They leverage industry-leading tools and expertise to resolve complex issues, prevent future problems, and improve client IT environments.

This role is perfect for someone who enjoys solving challenging technical problems while also designing and implementing improvements that make a real impact.



Key Responsibilities:



Client Support (All Levels)



Provide technical support to clients via phone,
, and remote access—handling everything from basic troubleshooting to advanced escalations.

Diagnose and resolve hardware, software, and network issues for multiple clients.

Perform O365 and Windows administration, user account management, and access provisioning.

Support and troubleshoot VOIP systems (e.g., 3CX).

Manage and maintain RMM and PSA tools (e.g., Datto, Halo).

Mentor junior engineers and provide guidance to improve team troubleshooting skills.





Projects & Innovation



Lead or assist with IT projects, e.g cloud migrations, system upgrades, deployments, and process automation etc.

Identify and implement solutions to reduce recurring issues and improve efficiency.

Develop and maintain PowerShell scripts to automate routine tasks and streamline operations.

Collaborate with vendors and clients to plan, test, and deliver new IT solutions.



Documentation & Communication



Log issues and resolutions accurately for future reference.

Communicate effectively with clients and vendors to ensure smooth resolutions and project delivery.



Requirements



Previous experience working in an MSP environment is a plus.

Excellent communication skills – able to have comfortable, friendly conversations in English without being overly formal or technical.

Strong attention to detail and follow-through – “never let it go until it’s solved.”

Demonstrable experience working with Windows systems (client/server) and O365 administration.

Proficiency in advanced troubleshooting methodologies.

Scripting skills, particularly in PowerShell, to automate tasks and improve efficiency.

Experience with VOIP systems and a solid understanding of network infrastructure.

Familiarity with RMM and PSA platforms used in MSP environments (e.g., Datto, Halo).

We are heavy users of Office 365 and Azure, so you’ll need to have solid experience and know the fundamentals or demonstrate skills in something very similar..

Ability to handle difficult tasks, set proper expectations, and deliver solutions within a reasonable timeframe.

Out-of-the-box thinker – proactive, creative, and always looking to improve processes.

Willingness to go the extra mile to ensure client satisfaction.

Ability to “figure things out,” even when facing new or unfamiliar technologies.

title: Content & Production Coordinator (Live Shows & Podcast | Remote)
description:
Content & Production Coordinator (Live Shows & Podcast)

Full-time | Remote | CST hours



Take note: This is a FULL-TIME role, so if you're looking for an additional work on top of your current employment, this might not be the best fit for you.



We’re looking for a highly organized Content & Production Coordinator to manage guest coordination, show preparation, and backend execution across multiple weekly live shows and a podcast.



What You’ll Do

• Coordinate guest booking, scheduling, and onboarding

• Manage production calendars for 5 weekly live shows + 1 podcast

• Prepare show assets (scripts, slides, graphics coordination)

• Set up and manage live broadcasts (e.g. Streamyard)

• Support live shows (timing, transitions, backend execution)

• Organize files, workflows, and recurring processes

• Coordinate post-production and content publishing



?



What We’re Looking For

• 2+ years experience in coordination, production, or project management roles

• Experience supporting podcasts, live shows, or content production workflows is required

• Strong organizational and time management skills

• Comfortable managing multiple recurring deadlines

• Clear and professional English communication

• Familiar with tools like Google Drive, Calendly, ClickUp, or similar

• Experience with Streamyard or similar tools is a strong advantage



Please answer the screening questions below along with your updated resume. 

1. Have you supported live shows, podcasts, or similar productions before? Please describe your exact role and responsibilities.

2. This role involves managing 5 weekly live shows and 1 podcast. How would you organize and track all tasks to ensure nothing is missed each week?

3. Which tools have you used for live show or content production (e.g., Streamyard, Zoom, OBS, etc.)? Briefly describe how you used them.

4. You’re about to go live in 2 minutes. A guest hasn’t joined, and the slides are incomplete. What would you do?

5. How do you ensure accuracy and consistency when handling repetitive weekly tasks like show prep and scheduling?

title: Backend Developer. Geospatial / Mapping App
description:
THE PROJECT



We're building a map-first mobile exploration app for the Australian market. The real-world travel becomes a mapped, gamified, shareable journey.



The frontend is built in React Native (Expo). The map renderer is Mapbox. We have a detailed data architecture spec and a two-layer mapping data strategy ready to implement. The frontend developer is actively building screens.



We need a backend developer who specialises in geospatial data to build the engine from the ground up. The backend is greenfield, no legacy code, no existing database to inherit. You're building it clean from a detailed spec.



---



WHAT YOU'LL BUILD



- PostgreSQL database with PostGIS, full schema design and implementation for users, locations, challenges, badges, journeys, and social content

- Mapbox Search Box API integration, civilisation layer (fuel, food, accommodation, services, entertainment) served via live API calls

- OpenStreetMap + government data import adventure layer (campgrounds, lookouts, trails, dump points, rest areas, national parks) bulk imported from OSM extracts and Australian government open data sources into PostGIS

- RESTful API layer endpoints for map queries (nearby POIs, bounding box searches, category filtering, route data), user auth, challenge management, badge logic, journey tracking

- Spatial query optimisation, efficient indexing and query patterns for serving map tile data to a mobile client at speed

- Mapbox integration, Map Matching API for road-snapped routes, static map previews for sharing, coordinate handling between client and server

- Auth system,
, Google, and Apple sign-in

- Object storage setup, Cloudflare R2 for images, avatars, and media storage

- WebSocket layer, real-time messaging and notifications (
 or equivalent)

- Deployment on Render, backend hosting, environment management, CI/CD pipeline



---



TECH STACK



Required:

- PostgreSQL + PostGIS (non-negotiable, the entire data architecture is designed for this)

- Node.js / Express or equivalent backend framework

- Experience importing and working with OpenStreetMap data or government geospatial datasets

- Spatial query design, bounding box, radius search, nearest-neighbour, geometry operations

- REST API design for mobile clients

- Git workflow (GitHub)



Preferred:

- Mapbox GL JS / Mapbox APIs

- React Native (Expo) understanding of mobile client needs

- Cloudflare R2 or S3-compatible object storage

- Render or similar PaaS deployment

- OAuth2 / social login implementation

- WebSocket experience (
)



---



WHAT WE PROVIDE



- Detailed data architecture specification (database schema, import pipeline, API endpoints, category taxonomy all documented)

- Mapbox style configuration (custom dark satellite theme, ready to use)

- Frontend developer building screens in parallel ready to wire up as endpoints become available

- Product Director available daily for decisions and direction

- Clear scope, clear priorities, no ambiguity



---



ENGAGEMENT STRUCTURE



- Type: Contract. initial 6-8 week engagement with potential to extend. 

- Start: Immediate

- Working style: Remote, async-friendly, but must overlap with Australian Eastern time for at least 2-3 hours daily for check-ins. Front end dev located in PH.

- Communication: WhatsApp + GitHub



---



WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE



Sprint 1: PostgreSQL/PostGIS stood up on Render. Auth working. Core schema deployed. First OSM data import running. Mapbox Search Box API wired for civilisation layer.



Sprint 2: API endpoints serving location data to the mobile app. Map queries performing well. Challenges and badge logic implemented.



Sprint 3: Journey tracking, social features, and real-time messaging wired up. Frontend fully connected to live backend.



Sprint 4: Integration testing, performance tuning, beta-readiness.



---



HOW TO APPLY



Send us:

1. A brief intro, who you are, where you're based, your availability

2. Examples of previous work with PostGIS or geospatial data (this is the most important thing, show us you've done spatial work before)

3. Your rate (hourly or weekly)

4. How quickly you can start



---



We're not looking for a generalist who "can probably figure out PostGIS." We need someone who's already built with it. If you've imported OSM data, written spatial queries, or built a mapping backend before, we want to hear from you.

title: Remote Sales Service Executive (Online Lead Specialist)
description:
We are a fast-growing aesthetic clinic group based in Singapore, focused on delivering high-quality, doctor-led treatments. As we expand, we are building a dedicated online sales team to handle patient enquiries and convert them into clinic visits.



Role Overview

We are looking for a sales-driven, customer-focused individual to manage incoming WhatsApp/Social Media/other online enquiries and convert them into consultation bookings. You will be using our centralised CRM system to handle all incoming leads, and training will be provided.



Your main goal is to engage, follow up, and convert leads into paying patients. If you enjoy chatting with customers, closing sales, and being rewarded for performance, this role is for you.



Key Responsibilities

1. Lead Engagement

? - Respond to Whatsapp and other online enquiries promptly (within 5–15 minutes)

? - Understand customer concerns and recommend suitable solutions

2. Sales Conversion

? - Guide potential patients toward booking a consultation

? - Handle objections (pricing, concerns, hesitation) confidently

? - Follow structured sales scripts and frameworks

3. Follow-Up & Nurturing

? - Maintain consistent communication until conversion or closure

4. Appointment Booking

? - Offer and secure consultation slots

? - Coordinate with clinic schedules

5. Lead Tracking

? - Ensure proper tagging and documentation



What We’re Looking For

Must-Have

? - Strong communication skills (clear, friendly, persuasive)

? - Sales-driven mindset (comfortable closing conversations)

? - Fast typing and ability to handle multiple chats

? - Responsible, disciplined, and able to work remotely



Good to Have

? - Experience in sales, customer service, or aesthetics industry

? - Experience handling WhatsApp / online enquiries

? - Familiarity with beauty or aesthetic treatments



Key Traits for Success

? - Proactive (you follow up, not wait)

? - Persuasive but not pushy

? - Organised and detail-oriented

? - Comfortable working with targets and KPIs



Compensation & Benefits:  

- Competitive base salary of 550USD - 650USD

- Performance-based incentives of 10 USD per lead that attend clinic session



? Remote working flexibility

? - Training and structured scripts provided



Performance Expectations

You will be measured on:

? - Response time

? - Booking conversion rate

? - Show-up rate

? - Revenue generated from leads



Why Join Us?

? - Be part of a growing aesthetic clinic group

? - Clear system and training provided

? - High earning potential with incentives

? - Opportunity to grow into senior sales or team lead roles



How to Apply

Please submit your resume along with a short message explaining why you are suitable for this role.



Note:

Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted. Candidates with strong sales ability will be prioritised.

title: Part-Time Production Designer
description:
WE'RE HIRING — PART-TIME PRODUCTION DESIGNER

Remote • Cebu City preferred • Ongoing • Long-term







A LITTLE BIT ABOUT US



Hi! We're a married couple running a small Etsy print-on-demand business. I'm European and my wife is Filipino, and we live and work here in Cebu City.



We've been building our store together for the past two years, and things are now growing faster than our time allows.



Right now we run one store offering a range of products across different categories, and we're gradually shaping it more toward kids and families. At the same time, we're building a second store from scratch focused on adults, personalized home decor, and gift products. It's an exciting stage for us, which is exactly why we're looking for the right person to come on board.



We are not a big company or an agency. We're simply two people who care about what we create and how we work. We're hoping to find someone who enjoys doing good work and wants to grow with us over the long term.







WHAT THIS ROLE ACTUALLY IS



We want to be open about what this role involves so you have a clear understanding from the start.



This is primarily a production design role, not a concept design position.



We do the research, study trends, and gather references. Your role is to take those references and recreate designs inspired by them — original in execution, clean, and consistent.



If you are someone who takes pride in doing things well, follows a brief carefully, and delivers on time, this could be a great long-term fit.







WHAT YOU WILL DO



Each week you will receive a batch of design references from us. Your job is to work through them and deliver:



• Recreate designs in Canva or Kittl, inspired by the reference, original in execution, never a direct copy

• Designs range from very simple (a quote on a frame, maybe 10 minutes) to more involved layouts using Kittl elements or AI generated assets. It varies week to week.

• Deliver all files to our shared Canva folder within the agreed timeframe



Volume varies depending on what we find in our research each week. Some weeks more, some weeks less. You will always have a clear brief for each design so there is no guessing involved.







HOW WE WORK TOGETHER



We keep things simple, flexible and low stress. Here is what working with us actually looks like:



• We share references and briefs through Trello, our shared task board, so everything is clear and organised in one place

• Finished files go into our shared Canva folder, simple and organised

• You work through your tasks at your own pace and on your own schedule

• You have one week from when you receive the brief to deliver it

• We are responsive, clear and easy to work with. If something comes up just let us know. We are human too.



We genuinely want this to be a long-term working relationship. We have a second store launching, more products coming, and real growth ahead. If you are reliable and the work is good, there will always be more for you here. The right person could be working with us for years.







HOW WE GET STARTED



To make sure the role is a good fit for both sides, we start with a two-week paid trial period.



During this time you will receive a few small design batches so we can both see how the workflow feels. If everything works well for both sides, the role continues as a long-term position.



For shortlisted candidates we may also ask for a very small design task before the trial begins, just so we can see how you approach a typical production design. It will be short, simple, and we appreciate the time it takes.







TOOLS YOU WILL WORK WITH



Canva — Our primary tool. All designs and files live here. You will work inside our shared Canva account. Strong Canva skills are essential.



Kittl — We use this alongside Canva for certain design styles. Experience is a real plus. If you know Canva well, Kittl is not hard to learn.



AI image tools — We expect you to be comfortable using AI image generation tools such as Gemini or Ideogram to create design assets. You use your own account. Both have free plans available.



Trello — Our task management tool. We use it to share briefs, track progress and keep everything organised. Easy to pick up if new to you.







WHO WE ARE LOOKING FOR



• Strong Canva skills

• Comfortable recreating designs from references

• Organised and able to follow briefs carefully

• Reliable and consistent

• Good written English for communication

• Familiarity with Etsy, Amazon, or similar platforms is a plus

• Examples of your design work are required



No prior print-on-demand experience is required. We will walk you through our workflow.







PAY



We pay per design, so your earnings reflect exactly what you deliver each month.



• Simple design (quick layout, text and frame style): $3 per design

• Standard design (more involved, Kittl elements or AI assets): $5 per design



To give you a real example: 40 simple and 40 standard designs in a month equals $120 + $200 = $320 for that month.



A lighter month will be around $150 to $200. A busier month can reach $350 or more. It scales naturally with the work.



Payment is made monthly in Philippine pesos at the current exchange rate. A simple written agreement is provided before you start.







THE DETAILS



Location: Remote. Work from anywhere in the Philippines. Cebu City is preferred but not required.

Hours: Part-time, roughly 1 to 2 days of actual work per week. You choose your own hours and schedule.

Deadline: You have one week from when you receive the brief to deliver it.

Trial period: Two weeks paid, to make sure the role is a good fit for both sides.

Start date: As soon as possible. We are ready when you are.

Commitment: Ongoing and long-term. We want someone who grows with us.

Task sharing: Via Trello.

File delivery: Via shared Canva folder.

Payment: Monthly in Philippine pesos at the current exchange rate.







HOW TO APPLY



We do not need a long cover letter. Just send us a short message that includes:



• Examples of your design work in any format, a folder link, screenshots, a portfolio page, anything that shows what you can do

• Your experience with Canva and Kittl

• Your availability per week and when you could start



To help us see that you have read this post carefully, please start your message with the word Canva.



Applications without design examples cannot be reviewed.

We read every application personally and will respond to shortlisted candidates within 3 to 5 business days.



We are easy to work with, we pay on time, and we genuinely care about the people we work with.

If this sounds like the kind of setup you have been looking for, we would love to hear from you.

title: Off-Page SEO & Link Building Specialist
description:
Full-Time Position | Remote

Position Overview

We are seeking an experienced Off-Page SEO and Link Building Specialist to join our digital marketing team. The ideal candidate will be responsible for developing and executing comprehensive link building strategies that improve domain authority, increase organic traffic, and enhance our online visibility. This role requires expertise in white-hat link acquisition techniques, relationship building, and advanced SEO methodologies including the skyscraper technique.

Key Responsibilities



Develop and implement strategic off-page SEO campaigns focused on high-quality link acquisition from authoritative websites

Execute the skyscraper method by identifying high-performing content in target niches, creating superior versions, and conducting strategic outreach to secure backlinks from websites linking to competing content

Conduct comprehensive link gap analysis and competitive backlink research to identify link building opportunities

Build and maintain relationships with webmasters, bloggers, journalists, and industry influencers for ongoing link placement opportunities

Create compelling outreach campaigns and personalized
 pitches that generate positive responses and secure quality backlinks

Manage guest posting campaigns, including identifying target websites, coordinating content creation, and securing publication with proper link attribution

Monitor and analyze backlink profiles using tools such as Ahrefs, Moz, SEMrush, and Majestic to track performance and identify potential issues

Identify and disavow toxic or spammy backlinks that could harm domain authority

Collaborate with content and social media teams to create linkable assets such as infographics, research studies, tools, and comprehensive guides

Prepare monthly reports on link building performance, including metrics on new backlinks acquired, domain authority improvements, and referral traffic increases



Required Qualifications



3+ years of proven experience in off-page SEO and link building with demonstrable results

Expert knowledge of the skyscraper technique and its application in modern link building strategies

Proficiency with SEO tools including Ahrefs, Moz, SEMrush, Majestic, BuzzStream, or similar platforms

Strong understanding of Google's algorithm updates, ranking factors, and white-hat SEO best practices

Excellent written and verbal communication skills for effective outreach and relationship building

Demonstrated ability to analyze data and metrics to inform strategy and demonstrate ROI

Experience with content marketing and understanding of what makes content linkable and shareable

Self-motivated with excellent time management skills and ability to manage multiple campaigns simultaneously



Preferred Qualifications



Experience in digital PR and securing links from high-authority news and media outlets

Knowledge of technical SEO principles and how off-page factors integrate with on-page optimization

Familiarity with broken link building, resource page link building, and other advanced techniques

Experience working with international or multilingual SEO campaigns

Relevant certifications such as Google Analytics, HubSpot Inbound Marketing, or SEO-specific credentials

title: SHORT FORM VIDEO EDITOR | Day Shift
description:
We’re hiring someone who knows how to turn long-form content into sharp, high-retention short videos for platforms like TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts.



This role is for someone who understands pacing, hooks, and visual rhythm in short-form content, and knows how to edit with intention rather than just cutting clips.



—-----------------------------------------------------------------------------



READ THE ENTIRE JOB LISTING CAREFULLY. The final step of the hiring process will require the candidate to provide at least 1 former employer/team lead reference and at least 1 character reference. These will be verified prior to extending an offer.



--- ABOUT THE TEAM ---

Want to work in a rewarding, fast-paced, start-up atmosphere? Looking for significant growth and performance bonus opportunities? Have a growth mindset, value relationships, and dedicated to getting results? Then we might be a fit!



What is it like to work with us? HEAR FROM OUR TEAM!   





Our Core Values:

1) DELIGHT THE CLIENT:  We consistently exceed expectations by anticipating needs, delivering outstanding service, and creating those “magic 
nts” where every client feels seen and heard.

2) MASTER YOUR CRAFT:  We commit to continuous learning, share our expertise openly, and tackle every challenge with precision and a deep sense of duty.

3) FOLLOW THROUGH, ALWAYS:  When we say something will happen, it does—every time. We own every task, ensuring that nothing falls through the cracks, and when mistakes occur, we learn and improve immediately.



Our core values are important and the right candidate will share our values. We are building an awesome place to work, not just cutting together videos for our real estate business.



--- ABOUT YOU ---

Do you have strong creative instincts and know how to spot 
nts that make people stop scrolling? Are you proactive, adaptable, and detail-oriented? Do you have a sharp sense of pacing, an instinct for hooks, and a clear understanding of how short-form videos need to flow to hold attention? Do you take pride in clean edits and delivering videos that feel intentional and finished? Do our core values sound like a fit for who you are?



Then keep reading to see if we're a fit!



Responsibilities:

Short-Form Editing & Story Selection

- Review long-form videos, transcripts, or raw footage to identify short-form clip opportunities

- Select 
nts that are clear, engaging, and platform-appropriate

- Edit vertical videos optimized for TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts

- Create strong hooks, clean cuts, and natural pacing

- Deliver publish-ready videos that meet brand and platform standards



Captions, Visuals & Formatting

- Add on-screen captions (burned-in or SRT as required) with proper timing and readability

- Apply basic motion, zooms, punch-ins, and visual emphasis where appropriate

- Follow platform-specific formatting (aspect ratio, duration, safe margins)



Iteration & Workflow

- Implement feedback efficiently and meet agreed turnaround times

- Maintain clear file naming and folder organization

- Track edits, revisions, and delivery status as required



Requirements:

- A STABLE, HIGH-SPEED INTERNET CONNECTION, REQUIRED (at least 150mbps)

- Experience with Final Cut Pro X (or other editing software, such as Adobe After Effects and Premiere Pro) is required

- Strong preference for MacOS users

- Experience editing short-form vertical content for social platforms, required

- Strong understanding of short-form pacing, hooks, and retention

- Experience working from transcripts or long-form content, required

- Clean file organization and understanding of post-production workflo

- Portfolio of completed short-form video projects, required

- General understanding of brand, content marketing, YouTube, etc, required

- GREAT interpersonal and communication skills, required

- Ability to self-start, work on a tight schedule, and manage multiple project deadlines, required

- Ability to follow directions and a LOVE of completing lots of projects according to consistent specifications, required

- Growth mindset, required



--- APPLICATION & RECRUITMENT PROCESS ---

STEP 1:

Fill out the application form through the link below and write "green kangaroo" in the Additional Comments field.


 



STEP 2:

Qualified candidates may be invited to participate in two PAID test projects, $10-20 USD for each test project estimated to be 2-3hrs of work for each (a total of $20-40 USD!).



STEP 3:

Candidates who advance through the test project rounds will be invited to an interview.



STEP 4:

Before extending a trial offer, we will conduct a CHARACTER REFERENCE CHECK for the final candidate(s). CONDUCTING A REFERENCE CHECK will be the last step in the hiring process.



STEP 5:

Upon receiving a trial offer, you will be onboarded as a Short Form Video Editor with a 90-day PAID trial period. During this period, we expect you to demonstrate your video editing expertise, meet project deadlines, be a team player, and excel at what you do. A successful trial will lead to a permanent offer to join the team.

title: Social media marketing assistant - small romance publisher
description:
I'm a romance author with several genres and pen names branded as a small publisher. I'm looking for someone to assist me with marketing. You should be able to manage posting to multiple
 pages, Instagram and Tiktok accounts. You need to be able to make book marketing reels, slideshows, stills and videos with great hooks from my books (use of ChatGPT or similar is encouraged to help you find them).



My books are translated into multiple languages including French, German, Italian, Spanish and Brazilian Portuguese, with Dutch, Swedish and Polish starting shortly. You need to be able to duplicate the social media products into these languages using ChatGPT for colloquial translations and respond to readers seeking to engage on social media platforms. You will need to use a VPN to post content to all channels in order to 'localise' each account to the appropriate country.



Ideally, you will have a good understanding of Bookstagram and Booktok already. You should be skilled in graphic design, have a good understanding of romance hooks and tropes, and have skills in short-form video content creation and creation of reels etc. Proficiency using bulk-create in Canva is required. You will need to build each language-specific Instagram account to a level where trial reels can be posted to the account and will then be expected to maintain 3+ reels/day on each account - bulk scheduling ahead.



References will be provided to FREE resources (created by other authors) to guide you in what sort of content I am looking for, but you will be required to 'use' Instagram and Tiktok in order to keep up with current trends in the book marketing world, find viral sounds, and make the accounts appear 'real' accounts.



Up to US$100 additional per month can be made available for software subscriptions etc; you will be asked to show receipts and explain use cases. You will be expected to have a paid VPN and Canva Pro account at a minimum; it is vital that all source graphics and other materials are legally cleared for use.



Other tools you might with to access: a bulk scheduler that's not Meta Business Manager; Kling or other video creation software, Gemini/Antigravity etc. If there are specific tools you wish to use instead, we can discuss on a case by case basis.



1-2 additional device (phone etc) may be required to keep up with all the international accounts; this matter will be discussed after 1-2 months depending on success in the initial languages.



You are encouraged to be a self-starter. I am hiring someone because I don't have time to do this myself: I also don't have time to hold your hand constantly. While in the first 2-4 weeks I will need a fair amount of oversight and pre-approval for what you are doing, once I start seeing results I will encourage you to work independently and touch base only when I have a new book/translation for you to add to marketing efforts.

title: IT Support
description:
We are a U.S.-based IT and AI consulting firm serving small-to-medium businesses across the nation. We are growing and need a reliable, experienced IT Support Specialist to join our managed services team. You will be working directly on real client environments, so you need to think on your feet, communicate clearly with non-technical business owners, and know your tools without needing to be walked through them.

About the Role

This is a full-time remote position supporting U.S. clients primarily during Eastern business hours. You will handle Tier 1–2 support across a mix of cloud and on-premise environments. Day-to-day responsibilities include managing and troubleshooting Azure Active Directory and Microsoft Entra ID, administering on-premise Active Directory including Group Policy and OU structure, configuring and supporting VPN connections for remote workforce environments, and providing general networking support covering DNS, DHCP, routing, switching, and connectivity issues. You will also support AWS environments at a working level including EC2, IAM, and VPC basics, administer Microsoft 365 across Exchange Online, Teams, and SharePoint, and assist with DigitalOcean and Linux server environments used in client deployments. VoIP and FreePBX support is a plus. You are expected to document everything and communicate resolution clearly to clients without burying them in technical jargon.

What We're Looking For

You should have at least two years of hands-on experience in IT support or systems administration with direct exposure to Azure AD, Active Directory, VPN setup and troubleshooting, and Microsoft 365 administration. A solid understanding of TCP/IP networking fundamentals is non-negotiable. Experience with AWS, PowerShell scripting, Linux server management, or FreePBX is a strong advantage but not required. Relevant certifications such as CompTIA A+, Network+, Security+, or Microsoft AZ-104 are a plus. Most importantly, you need to be self-directed — we are not looking for someone who needs constant supervision. You should be able to take a problem, own it, and close it.

title: Newsletter Specialist - beehiiv, Email Marketing & Claude AI
description:
beehiiv Newsletter Writer -
 Marketing Expertise & AI Proficiency Required



We are Nest Marketing, a full-service
 and SMS retention marketing agency managing 60+ DTC and e-commerce brand clients. We've generated $175M+ in
 revenue for 250+ brands, and now we're looking for a skilled Newsletter Writer who can translate our deep
 marketing expertise into high-quality content.



What You'll Be Doing



You'll be creating 30 newsletters per month on our beehiiv platform, covering
 marketing strategy, retention tactics, DTC insights, and real-world case studies from our work with health supplement brands, peptide companies, and consumer goods clients.



These aren't generic newsletters. They need to be well-informed, tactical, and rooted in real expertise — the kind of content that
 marketers, agency owners, and DTC founders actually want to read.



The Role



- Write and publish 30 newsletters monthly on beehiiv

- Topics:
 marketing strategy, Klaviyo tactics, SMS marketing, retention optimization, subscription growth, segmentation, flows, campaigns, creative testing, and DTC trends

- Use Claude AI to research, draft, and refine content (you must know how to prompt effectively)

- Manage the full beehiiv platform: scheduling, formatting, audience segmentation, analytics tracking

- Collaborate with our team to pull real insights and case studies from client work

- Maintain a consistent voice: direct, anti-guru, tactical, no fluff



Requirements



Must-Haves:

- Proven experience using beehiiv (platform navigation, newsletter creation, audience management, analytics)

- Strong understanding of
 marketing fundamentals (flows, campaigns, segmentation, deliverability, metrics)

- Deep familiarity with Claude AI and how to use it for content creation (prompting, editing, research)

- Excellent English writing skills — clear, concise, engaging

- Ability to turn complex marketing concepts into digestible content

- Self-starter who can manage deadlines independently

- Available to work weekdays and weekends as needed



Bonus Points:

- Experience with Klaviyo, 
, or other
 platforms

- Background in DTC, e-commerce, or retention marketing

- Familiarity with health/supplement brands

- Experience writing for marketing agencies or B2B audiences

- Knowledge of AI tools beyond Claude (ChatGPT, Perplexity, etc.)



Getting to Know You



Please answer these questions in your application:



1. Have you used beehiiv to create and manage newsletters before? If yes, for how long?

2. Can you share examples of newsletters or marketing content you've written? (Please include links)

3. How do you currently use Claude or other AI tools in your writing process?

4. What's your experience with
 marketing? (Platforms used, types of campaigns, etc.)

5. How would you approach writing a newsletter about "advanced Klaviyo segmentation strategies" for an audience of
 marketers?

6. Can you commit to producing 30 newsletters per month (roughly 1 per day)?

7. Are you available to start immediately?

8. What's your timezone and preferred working hours?



About Nest Marketing



We're a team of 50+
 and SMS specialists working with top DTC brands in health supplements, peptides, and consumer goods. Our work is data-driven, creative-first, and focused on retention and LTV growth.



Learn more: nestmarketing.co



Growth Opportunity



This role is perfect for someone who wants to build their reputation in the
 marketing space while working with a fast-growing agency. As we scale, there's opportunity for increased responsibility, salary growth, and deeper involvement in our content strategy.



Compensation: TBD based on experience

Volume: 30 newsletters/month

Start Date: Immediate

Contract Type: Part-time contractor (with potential to scale)



To Apply: Please submit your answers to the questions above along with relevant writing samples and beehiiv experience. Only applications with newsletter/email marketing samples will be considered.

title: APS Consulting Recruitment Notice
description:
APS Consulting is a Sydney-based advisory firm providing comprehensive strategic consulting services to clients worldwide. As we continue to expand our global footprint, we are seeking experienced Overseas Consultants with strong expertise in government relations, and a deep understanding of political affairs, economics, law, and public policy.



Scope of Work and Responsibilities  

Consultants in this role primarily support research, policy analysis, and advisory work related to overseas political, regulatory, and governance developments. Typical tasks include:



Conducting background research and policy monitoring



Stakeholder mapping and engagement analysis



Drafting analytical briefs and memos



Supporting scenario planning and risk assessments for client decision-making



Types of Clients and Projects  

Our clients generally include private enterprises, professional institutions, and organizations with cross-border interests that require an informed understanding of overseas political, regulatory, or public-sector environments. Projects are research- and analysis-driven, and may relate to:



Public policy trends



Government processes



Geopolitical risk assessments



Work Structure (approximately 20 hours per week)  

This is a flexible, part-time consultancy arrangement. Work is typically project-based, with weekly hours varying depending on deliverables and timelines. Coordination is conducted remotely, and schedules are discussed in advance to align with both project requirements and consultant availability.



Preferred Backgrounds  

Candidates with prior experience in the following sectors will be given priority consideration:



Government or public administration



Law firms or legal advisory institutions



Media or strategic communications organizations



Think tanks or research institutions



Consulting or public relations firms



Non-governmental or international organizations



Compensation and Benefits  

We offer competitive compensation packages and flexible work arrangements tailored to global professionals.

title: GHL + Admin VA — Automations, Funnels & Email Support for Coaching Business
description:
Hey, before you apply.  Please read this whole post. I'm looking for a specific person and I'd rather find the right one than get 200 applications from people who've never opened Go High Level.

About the role

I'm Fiona, and I run an established online relationship coaching business from Australia. I've been doing this for over 16 years, I have multiple programs, active funnels, a growing audience, and a brand that means a lot to me.

I need a VA who can genuinely own the tech side of things,  someone who knows their way around Go High Level like the back of their hand, and who doesn't need me to explain what a workflow trigger is.

This starts at 25 hours per week (100 hours/month) and could move to full-time for the right person. I'm not looking for someone to "try out".  I want someone who wants to stay and grow with the business.

Pay: ?30,000/month (depending on experience), paid fortnightly. Room to increase as you move to full-time.

What you'll actually be doing



Building and managing automations, workflows, and
 sequences in GHL

Setting up surveys, forms, and assessment tools in GHL

Configuring calendars and booking systems in GHL

Building and optimising funnels and landing pages

Creating graphics and content in Canva

Basic YouTube SEO (titles, descriptions, tags, thumbnails)

Managing Google Docs, Sheets, and Drive

Using AI tools like Claude and Gemini to support content and workflows

General admin as needed to keep things running smoothly



You MUST have



Real, hands-on Go High Level experience, automations, funnels, contacts, calendars, surveys, workflows. This is non-negotiable. If you've only watched a few YouTube tutorials, this isn't the role for you.

Strong written and spoken English

Experience with Canva

Familiarity with AI tools (Claude, Gemini, ChatGPT)

Basic YouTube SEO knowledge

High attention to detail,  you catch what others miss



You should be

A self-starter who doesn't need hand-holding

Someone who sees what needs doing and does it

Reliable and consistent,  you show up and you deliver

Comfortable working independently and communicating openly when you have questions



How to apply (important, please follow these steps)



Start your application with the word "GHL", so I know you've read this far

Tell me briefly about a specific automation or funnel you've built in Go High Level,  what it was for, and how you set it up?

Include a link to anything you've designed in Canva (even a screenshot is fine)



If your application doesn't include these three things, I won't be able to consider it.

I'm looking to fill this quickly, so if this sounds like you, don't wait.



Fiona

title: Sales, Growth & Acquisitions Coordinator - Join the 'Disney' of short-stays
description:
Who We Are



We are a visionary company in the short-stay space with ambitions to become the “Disney of short-stays.” Every property we touch is transformed into a one-of-a-kind experience — something cinematic, magical, and unforgettable.



Our growth is accelerating, and we’re building a team that’s relentless about execution. This role is about being the backbone of our sales and acquisitions process — the one who makes sure nothing slips through the cracks.



The Role



We’re looking for a Growth & Acquisitions Coordinator to work directly with our Director of Growth & Acquisitions.



You will:



Keep our sales pipeline moving with flawless execution.

Make sure every call is scheduled, every lead followed up, every promise tracked.

Confidently communicate with clients, agents, and prospects by phone and
.

Proactively search for new growth opportunities — from real estate listings,
 groups, and industry networks — and feed them into the pipeline.

Be the “right hand” to the Director, ensuring she spends all her time selling and closing while you drive consistency, 
ntum, and new opportunities.



Responsibilities



1. Sales & Lead Support

Schedule and confirm discovery calls, prepare notes, and handle follow-ups.

Update CRM (Copper) and spreadsheets so data is always accurate.

Draft professional, natural
s after every sales interaction.



2. Client, Agent & Prospect Communication

Call clients and real estate agents to provide updates, confirm details, or chase deliverables.

Confidently step into outbound cold calls when required (scripts provided).



3. Business Building & Lead Generation

Monitor
 groups, property forums, and online marketplaces for potential property opportunities.

Share promising real estate listings and potential fits with the Director.

Support real estate partner outreach by sending information, updates, or opportunities.



4. Project Coordination

Track deals as they move from first call ? design ? transformation.

Ensure internal teams deliver on promises and deadlines.

Chase follow-ups relentlessly so nothing stalls.



5. Reporting & Admin

Generate weekly sales and pipeline reports.

Maintain organized files, inboxes, and schedules.

Flag bottlenecks before they become problems.



Requirements



1. Fluent, natural English — written and spoken. Neutral or Western-style accent preferred.

2. Confident making calls to clients, agents, and prospects.

3. Experience in sales coordination, business development support, or project management.

4. Highly organized, detail-obsessed, and proactive.

5. Comfortable in a fast-paced, ambitious startup environment.

6 Relentless about execution — you don’t let tasks slip.





Application Instructions (Do Not Skip)



To apply, please submit:



1. Your CV / Resume

2. A 2–3 minute video introducing yourself where you cover:

Your experience in a similar role.

An example of when you had to keep a sales pipeline or project moving.

How you’ve previously hunted for business opportunities (leads, partnerships, listings).

And most importantly: If someone told you that you are about to join a company that has the aspiration to become the “Disney of the short-stay industry” — what would you say?

title: Interior Designer (Full-Time, Remote) – Build Magical Spaces for a Global Hospitality Brand
description:
We’re looking for a full-time Interior Designer to join a fast-growing hospitality brand that builds immersive, story-driven spaces, often described as the Disney of short stays.



This is not a freelance or side-hustle role.



This is a full-time, exclusive position for a designer who wants to fully commit to one brand, own projects end-to-end, and build a long-term creative career.



If you’re looking to juggle multiple clients or keep other professional commitments, this role will not be the right fit.





About the Role:



You will be the sole Interior Designer responsible for running design projects from start to finish.



That means you will:



- Lead each project from concept to final delivery

- Drive timelines, milestones, and 
ntum

- Run kick-offs, reviews, and design sessions

- Own modelling, layouts, FF&E, and specifications

- Proactively push projects forward without being chased

- Collaborate with a creative director for vision and alignment



You won’t be given tasks.

You’ll be given ownership.





Exclusivity & Focus (Important):



This role requires full professional focus.





We’re looking for someone who:



- Treats this as their only professional design role

- Does not take on other client work or employment

- Wants to invest their creative energy into building one brand deeply

- Thinks and operates as if this were their own business



We believe the quality and pace of work we’re aiming for is only possible with complete focus and commitment.





The Kind of Designer We’re Looking For



This role is for someone who:

- Thinks like an owner, not an employee

- Is highly proactive and self-driven

- Is comfortable being the single point of responsibility

- Is responsive and reliable in fast-moving environments

- Takes pride in their work and their craft

- Wants to build a long-term career, not just complete jobs



We care far more about ownership, judgement, and 
ntum than about where you studied or how many years you’ve worked.



How We Work:



- Fully remote

- Outcome-driven

- High autonomy, high trust

- Fast-moving projects

- Real creative freedom



The only strict expectation is responsiveness when tagged or messaged, because that’s how projects keep moving.





Compensation Structure



- Monthly base pay

- Plus a performance-based bonus per project onboarded



High performers are directly rewarded for the projects they successfully deliver.



Exact figures will be discussed with shortlisted candidates.





What Success Looks Like



In your first 90 days, you’ll be:



- Running multiple projects independently

- Driving timelines without being prompted

- Producing high-quality, immersive designs

- Becoming the creative owner of our spaces





How to Apply



Please include:



- A link to your portfolio

- A short video answering these questions, uploaded to a public google drive link:



“This role requires full professional focus with no other work commitments. Why does that suit you at this stage of your career?” and "If someone was to tell you, you were going to join the Disney of the short-stay industry, how would that make you feel?"





If you’re looking for a place to truly own your craft and grow long-term, we’d love to hear from you.

We’re looking for a detail-obsessed, process-driven Accounts Receivable & Invoicing Specialist to handle invoicing, payment tracking, and reconciliation across multiple systems.



This role also includes administrative support responsibilities, requiring strong organization, communication, and the ability to manage multiple priorities in a fast-paced environment.



You will be working with multiple tools, managing high-volume transactions, and ensuring absolute accuracy in financial records and supporting documentation.



What You’ll Be Doing

Invoicing & Sales Order Processing

Generate invoices in QuickBooks with 100?curacy

Match shipping documents (BOL/POD) prior to invoicing

Maintain and update Invoice Tracker in Google Sheets

Ensure correct currency setup (USD/EUR)

Payment Processing & Matching

Investigate discrepancies and resolve mismatches promptly

Track payment batches and reconcile deposits accurately

Specialized Invoicing (Advanced)

Handle EU VAT scenarios and compliance requirements

Apply correct tax treatments based on shipping and billing regions

Administrative & Operational Support

Maintain organized digital filing system (SOs, invoices, BOLs, PODs, contracts)

Assist with data entry, report preparation, and document tracking

Coordinate with Sales, Warehouse, and Finance teams on order status and issues

Monitor shared inboxes and respond or route inquiries appropriately

Support scheduling, follow-ups, and internal communication across departments

Assist with audit preparation and document requests

Process Compliance & Documentation

Follow SOPs strictly and flag inconsistencies

Ensure all transactions are properly documented and audit-ready

Continuously identify process improvements and efficiency opportunities

What We’re Looking For

Must-Haves

2+ years experience in Accounts Receivable or Invoicing

Strong experience with QuickBooks

High proficiency in Google Sheets (XLOOKUP, filtering, reconciliation)

Experience handling high-volume transactions

Extreme attention to detail (non-negotiable)

Strong organizational and administrative skills

Bonus Points If You Have

Experience with ERP systems, Shopify, or Maverick Payments

Exposure to EU VAT rules or international invoicing

Experience with dropshipping or inventory-based businesses

Prior experience in administrative or operations support roles

How to Apply



Submit your resume and include the word "Hara Supply" in your cover letter.

title: Shopify VA
description:
About us

The Good Kid is a streetwear and sneaker retailer based in Western Sydney with stores at Parramatta Westfield and Hurstville Westfield, plus an active online store on Shopify. We move fast and carry a rotating mix of brands — we need someone who can keep our catalogue clean, accurate, and live without us having to chase it.



What you'll be doing

Upload new products to Shopify — titles, descriptions, pricing, tags, variants (size/colour), and imagery



Resize, crop, and format product images to our store standards before uploading



Manage inventory quantities and update stock levels accurately across online and in-store channels



Write clean, accurate product descriptions — no fluff, factual and on-brand



Organise products into correct collections and categories on the site



Flag any product information gaps or inconsistencies before publishing



Bulk edit and clean up existing listings as needed (pricing changes, seasonal updates, discontinued items)



Assist with basic order management or fulfilment admin when required



What we need from you

Solid working knowledge of Shopify admin — products, variants, collections, metafields



Strong attention to detail — wrong sizes, prices, or descriptions cost us real money



Comfortable working from a brief or product sheet with minimal hand-holding



Fast turnaround — we often need new product live within 24 hours of receiving assets



Basic image editing ability (Canva or Photoshop) for resizing and prepping photos



Familiarity with streetwear or sneaker brands is a bonus — not essential but saves time

title: SEO & Digital Marketing Specialist
description:
The Role



You are not just an SEO specialist — you are a lead generation engine. Your job is to grow organic traffic AND ensure that traffic converts into phone calls, form submissions, and booked appointments. Rankings without leads are worthless. We measure success in leads generated, not just positions gained.



What You'll Own



SEO Strategy & Execution 

Execute SEO roadmaps and growth plans for multiple client accounts

Perform competitive gap analysis using SEMrush (Keyword Gap, Position Tracking, Site Audit)

Build and maintain keyword architecture and topical authority maps

Diagnose traffic drops and implement recovery strategies

Design scalable internal linking systems across client sites

Manage AI SEO strategy and implementation (AI Overviews, GEO optimization)

Weekly position tracking, monthly reporting with actionable insights



Technical SEO & Site Health

Conduct advanced technical audits (SEMrush, Ahrefs, or SE Ranking)

Crawl and indexation optimization — fix what's broken, prevent what could break

Redirect strategy, cleanup, and chain resolution

Canonical and duplication management

Core Web Vitals monitoring and improvement recommendations

Structured data implementation and validation (JSON-LD, 
)

Site recovery and migration support when needed

Fix errors flagged by SEMrush, Ahrefs, and Google Search Console



Local SEO & Google Business Profile 

GBP Optimization:

Conduct thorough GBP audits for each client

Enhance profiles with categories, services, compelling descriptions

Publish weekly engaging posts with photos and CTAs

Update and optimize images and videos with geotagging

Craft optimized GBP descriptions

Build Q&A sections and manage review responses within 24 hours

Map Pack Strategy:

Map Pack ranking strategy and tracking

Multi-location SEO architecture

Location page optimization with genuine local content

Entity alignment and local authority building

Local Citations:

Conduct citation audits to identify and fix NAP inaccuracies

Execute citation cleanup across 20+ directories per client

Expand citation portfolio with strategic keyword integration

Utilize aggregators and niche directories for wider reach

Local Signals:

Schema markup compliance for LocalBusiness, Service, FAQPage

Google Maps citation strengthening

Google Stacking techniques for enhanced visibility

Web 2.0 profiles with relevant local context and anchor text optimization



Content Production & Optimization 

Write and publish 2 blog posts per week per client targeting specific keywords from gap analysis

Each post must include: expert quotes, sourced statistics, outbound links, answer-first formatting

Manage content in headless CMS platforms (Sanity)

Conversion-focused content optimization — every page must have clear CTAs, compelling copy, and conversion paths. Don't just write for rankings — write for leads

Update and refresh existing content with fresh data quarterly



Conversion Optimization & Lead Generation

Monitor and optimize conversion paths on client websites (forms, phone clicks, booking calendars)

Track GA4 Key Events: form submissions, phone calls, appointment bookings

A/B test CTAs, form placement, and page layouts to improve conversion rates

Ensure every ranking page has a clear path to becoming a lead

Monthly reporting on leads by source, conversion rates, cost per lead

Work with GoHighLevel CRM to track lead-to-close pipeline



Link Building & Off-Page SEO

Develop and execute ethical link building strategies

Respond to HARO/Connectively/Qwoted for earned media opportunities

Pitch client content and data reports to local media

Manage directory, association, and industry listings

Build web 2.0 profiles with keyword-rich local content

Drip-fed link indexing management

Site structure and internal linking optimization



Requirements



Must Have

3+ years of hands-on SEO experience with measurable results — traffic growth, ranking improvements, and most importantly, lead generation

Local SEO expertise — you've optimized GBP listings, built citation profiles, ranked in Map Packs, and managed multi-location SEO

Technical SEO skills — you can run site audits, fix crawl issues, manage redirects, implement structured data, and resolve indexing problems

Content writing ability — 1,500-2,500 word blog posts that read naturally, not AI-generated filler. Strong English grammar required

SEMrush proficiency — Site Audit, Position Tracking, Keyword Gap, On-Page SEO Checker, Backlink Analytics

Google Search Console + GA4 — you pull data, interpret it, and make strategic decisions

Conversion mindset — you don't just chase rankings. You ask "how does this turn into a lead?" for every piece of work you do

Self-directed execution — we provide playbooks and SOPs. You execute consistently without daily direction

Reliable and deadline-driven — content goes out on schedule, reports delivered on time, every week



Nice to Have

GoHighLevel experience — workflow building, pipeline management, automation triggers, reporting

Astro.js or modern framework experience — ability to make minor code changes (internal links, schema updates, meta tag fixes) without a developer. Familiarity with Astro, Next.js, Hugo, or similar static site generators

Home services / contractor industry experience — understanding what makes local service business content convert

AI-assisted workflows — you use Claude, ChatGPT, or similar to accelerate research and drafting while maintaining quality and adding genuine expertise

JSON-LD / structured data knowledge — can build, validate, and troubleshoot schema markup

Sanity CMS experience — headless CMS for managing blog content and structured data

Link building experience — ethical outreach, digital PR, HARO, directory management

Graphic design basics — resize images, create GBP post graphics, basic Canva skills



How to Apply



Send us:



A link to a blog post you wrote that ranks on page 1 of Google for its target keyword. Tell us the keyword and current position.

An SEO case study — describe a campaign you managed: starting point, what you did, and measurable results (traffic, rankings, AND leads/conversions generated).

Your GBP experience — have you optimized Google Business Profile listings? Show an example or describe your process.

Your experience with our tools — specifically SEMrush, GoHighLevel, and any headless CMS (Sanity).

A 200-word writing sample — pick any home improvement topic (e.g., "bathroom remodel cost" or "kitchen renovation tips") and write 200 words as if it were the opening of a blog post. We want to see your writing quality and natural English.

Your availability and expected monthly salary in PHP or USD.



No cover letter needed. Show us what you've done, what you can write, and what leads you've generated. Results over resumes.

---



Spreadsheets



Microsoft Excel

Basic Content Editing Tools



Canva

CapCut

InShot



---



If you have experience with any other tools related to website management, digital publishing, or online business operations, please list them below.

title: PART-TIME SHORT-FORM VIDEO EDITOR

title: Ads Specialist (Part-Time | Performance-Driven | AI-Focused)
description:
Who I'm looking for....



Someone that knows they are wicked talented and just hasn’t gotten the chance to work on something big.



Like… really big.



We’re building for an audience of 40+ million people, going up against some of the biggest internet companies on the planet.



This isn’t a small opportunity.



I’m looking for someone who knows their results are elite. Someone hyper-analytical. Someone borderline obsessive with the data—you don’t just read numbers, you live in them. You feel the pulse of campaigns. You spot patterns early. You move before everyone else catches up.



If you’ve ever refreshed a dashboard every five minutes for a week straight just to squeeze out another 1% improvement… you’re probably who I’m looking for.



ABOUT THE ROLE

We’re hiring a Part-Time Ads Specialist to join a fast-moving, high-performance team.



This is not a “log in, do tasks, log out” role. You’ll be taking this task off the Founder's hands. You’ll be working with the CEO directly at times and have the opportunity to be a key player in our marketing department. 



You’ll be:

- Actively collaborating with the team

- Joining calls and strategy sessions

- Contributing ideas, not just execution

- Owning performance like it’s your own business





What You’ll Be Doing:

- Launching and optimizing paid ad campaigns across platforms

- Running continuous A/B tests (creatives, copy, audiences, funnels)

- Analyzing performance data and identifying scaling opportunities

- Working closely with creatives and copywriters

- Bringing new strategies and testing ideas proactively

- Making data-backed decisions to improve ROAS, CPA, and overall performance





Platforms You Must Have Experience In

- Google Ads

- Meta Ads 
 & Instagram)

- Reddit Ads



You should already have impressive case studies to share and talk about across these platforms. Not all 3 are required, but he who has will stand out among the rest.



AI-Driven Mindset (Non-Negotiable)

We are AI driven  at the core. Every employee here takes advantage of any and all available tools to increase productivity and results.



You should:

- Use AI tools to improve campaign performance

- Automate repetitive workflows

- Leverage AI for testing, research, and creative iteration

- Stay ahead of trends in AI + marketing





Work Setup

- Part-Time (to start)

- Schedule: 08:00 AM - 12:00 PM (Preferred), open to: 10:00 AM – 2:00 PM (Philippine Time) as well. 



Must be:

- Available during working hours

- Responsive/on-call when needed

- Present and engaged in meetings and team discussions





Who You Are

- Deeply results-driven (you care about performance, not vanity metrics)

- Highly analytical and detail-oriented

- Proactive—you don’t wait for instructions

- Competitive and driven to win

- Strong communicator and team player

- Comfortable in a fast-paced, high-growth environment





Why This Role is Different

- You’re not just managing ads.

- You’re helping scale something that has the potential to reach tens of millions of people globally.

- If you’ve been waiting for your chance to prove what you can really do—this is it.



How To Apply:

Impress us. You’re an advertiser, a marketer. Prove it.

title: Hotel & Hospitality Wholesale Outreach Specialist
description:
Overview

We are seeking a hands-on, execution-focused Wholesale Outreach Specialist to build a predictable pipeline of opportunities within the luxury hotel and hospitality sector. Our brand is a premium craft cookie company built for 
nts of celebration and indulgence.



In this role, you will own the top-of-funnel sales process: sourcing the right contacts, running multi-touch outreach campaigns, and teeing up warm conversations for the founder to close.

Work Structure & Compensation

Hours: Part-time (20 hours per week)

Timezone: Must be available to work within Central Time (CST)

Exclusivity: Candidates MUST NOT have a concurrent full-time job to ensure dedicated focus on our pipeline growth.



Key Responsibilities



1. Lead Sourcing & List Building

Identify and build targeted lead lists across boutique hotels, luxury concierge teams, and hotel management groups

Research and validate contact details for key decision-makers, specifically Food & Beverage Directors and Guest Experience Managers

Maintain clean, structured lead lists segmented by region, channel, and job title[cite: 884].



2. Outreach & Pipeline Management

Execute personalized, multi-touch
 campaigns using a warm, premium, and concise tone

Manage daily replies: qualify interest, answer basic questions, and move the conversation forward

Track all activity and pipeline status in a CRM (HubSpot/Apollo) or structured Google Sheet

Prepare "handoff briefs" for the founder, providing context on warm leads ready for closing calls



3. Reporting & Optimization

Provide weekly reporting with visual KPI tracking, including leads added, reply rates, and positive response rates

Identify what is working or failing and propose workflow changes to improve results[cite: 902].



Required Skills & Experience

Mandatory Hotel Experience: Direct professional experience within the hotel industry is required.

Sales Background: Proven track record in hotel sales, specifically candidates who have transitioned from Inside Sales to Outside Sales and understand the drivers that close hotel deals.

Decision-Maker Knowledge: Deep familiarity with hotel organizational structures and how to effectively navigate them to reach decision-makers.

Technical Proficiency: Comfortable building lead lists and running outbound campaigns end-to-end using tools like Apollo or HubSpot



Attributes: Extremely organized with follow-ups and pipeline tracking, high ownership, and fast execution speed.



Advantageous

Experience selling premium food, gifting, or amenities specifically into luxury hotels.



To Apply

Please submit your resume along with a **Loom video** (2–3 minutes) introducing yourself.

title: B2B Cold Caller – Solar Lead Generation (Part-Time, Remote)
description:
ABOUT US

SolarBridge is a B2B lead generation company helping solar installation companies across the United States get qualified homeowner leads. We're growing fast and looking for a professional, motivated cold caller to join our team and help us book sales demos with solar company decision-makers.



WHAT YOU'LL DO

Make 100+ outbound calls per day to solar installation company owners, VPs of Sales, and decision-makers across the US

Follow a proven script to qualify prospects and book 15-minute demos for our founder

Track all calls, conversations, and outcomes in our CRM (we'll train you)

Provide daily reports: calls made, conversations had, demos booked

Handle objections professionally and maintain a positive, confident tone

Work closely with our team to refine messaging and improve booking rates



WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR

REQUIRED:

Excellent English (spoken and written) – you'll be calling US business owners, so clear, professional communication is essential

Comfortable making 100+ calls per day

Self-motivated and results-driven – you'll work independently with daily check-ins

Reliable internet connection (minimum 10 Mbps download), quiet workspace, and quality headset/microphone

Available 20 hours/week (4 hours/day, Monday-Friday) during US business hours (9am-5pm EST/PST)



PREFERRED (but not required):

Previous experience with B2B cold calling

Familiarity with CRM tools (Google Sheets, HubSpot, etc.)

Background in sales or lead generation



WHAT WE OFFER



Trial Period (First 30 Days):

$200 USD base salary (paid at end of trial IF you book 8+ demos)

$25 bonus per demo booked (paid at end of trial)

Minimum 8 demos required to pass trial and receive payment

Part-time: 20 hours/week (4 hours/day, Monday-Friday)

Payment via PayPal or Stripe at end of 30-day trial period



Ongoing Employment (After Trial):

$450 USD/month base salary

$25 bonus per demo booked

Minimum 15 demos/month required to stay employed

Part-time: 20 hours/week to start

Potential to move to full-time (40 hrs/week) for top performers

Payment via PayPal or Stripe at end of each month



Example Earnings:

Book 8 demos in trial (minimum) = $200 USD base + $200 USD bonuses = $400 USD total

Book 10 demos in trial = $200 USD base + $250 USD bonuses = $450 USD total

Book 15 demos/month ongoing (minimum) = $450 USD base + $375 USD bonuses = $825 USD/month

Book 20 demos/month = $450 base + $500 bonuses = $950/month

Top performers (25+ demos/month) earn $1,075+/month

Important: Payment is performance-based. You must hit the minimum demo targets (8 demos for trial, 15 demos/month ongoing) to receive payment. We pay at the end of each period via PayPal or Stripe.



TRIAL PERIOD

Your first 14 days are a paid trial. Success criteria:

Minimum 8 demos booked in 14 days to continue employment and receive payment

Consistent daily activity (100 dials/day minimum)

Professional communication and positive attitude

If you hit these benchmarks, you'll transition to ongoing employment with potential to go full-time.

Note: If you do not book at least 8 demos during the trial period, the trial will end and no payment will be made. This is a performance-based role.



TO APPLY

Please include the following in your application (applications without these will not be reviewed):

1. SHORT INTRODUCTION (3-5 sentences): • Your name and background • Your cold calling experience (or relevant sales/customer service experience) • Why you're interested in this role

2. AVAILABILITY: • How many hours per week can you work? • What hours are you available (please specify your timezone)? • Can you work during US business hours (9am-5pm EST/PST)?

3. VOICE SAMPLE (REQUIRED): Record yourself reading this script:

"Hi [Name], this is [Your Name] calling from SolarBridge. We currently are helping solar installers across the US get qualified homeowner leads at $75 per lead with no long-term contracts allowing Installers to use our pipeline. Is lead generation something you're currently focused on at your company?"

• Use Vocaroo.com (free, no signup required) or any voice recording tool • Paste the link to your recording in your application • Applications without a voice sample will be automatically rejected



We're hiring immediately and will begin interviews this weekend.

Looking forward to working with you!
salary: $450+ USD Per Month - $25 USD Per Demo

title: Real Estate Cold Caller - Monthly bonuses
description:
If you have worked a calling job where you were handed a list of random numbers, given no real script, and left to figure it out on your own with zero support, this is worth reading.



Earn between $640 and $1,280 per month working remotely with a US based real estate investment company. Starting rate is $4 per hour with a clear path to $8 per hour as you prove yourself. Pay goes out reliably through Wise, Payoneer, or PayPal.



BMH Group is a cash buying operation based in Kansas City USA. We purchase distressed properties across Missouri and Ohio and we work with real motivated sellers every single day. Homeowners dealing with probate, absentee owners, people in distressed situations who genuinely need a solution. These are not cold strangers who have never heard of selling their home. These are people who have a real reason to talk.



Here is what one of our Cold Callers actually does on a typical shift:



Works through a curated list of distressed homeowners, absentee owners, and probate leads. Follows our proven script to open conversations and identify motivated sellers. Qualifies prospects and hands off warm leads to our acquisitions team. Keeps call notes clean and accurate so the team can follow up effectively.



What we are looking for is someone with excellent spoken and written English, a confident and calm phone presence, a quiet workspace and reliable internet, and someone coachable enough to follow a system and improve over time. Real estate experience is a plus but we will train the right person.



Here is how we filter for the right candidates. The hiring process includes a short roleplay exercise to assess how you sound on the phone.



Before you apply, visit 
 and read about who we are. Then use Vocaroo at 
 to record a short introduction and tell us who you are and why you think you are a good fit. Include that link in your application.

Send your application with the subject line: Go Chiefs!



Applications without that exact subject line will not be reviewed. This is how we know you read the full post and took it seriously. If that feels like too much work, this role is probably not a fit.

title: Freelance Graphic Designer
description:
About the Role:

We are a growing digital publishing company that produces high-quality digital workbooks, guides, and printable PDFs for online courses and e-learning businesses.



We’re expanding our creative team and hiring multiple graphic designers to create professional, visually appealing PDF workbooks.



If you enjoy layout design, pay close attention to detail, and want consistent, long-term freelance work, this role is an excellent fit.



What You’ll Be Doing:

- Designing digital workbooks (20–60 pages) using your preferred professional design tools (Adobe InDesign, Illustrator, Affinity, or similar)

- Following brand guidelines, templates, and content briefs provided by our team

- Producing clean, well-organized, and visually balanced layouts

- Ensuring on-time delivery (usually 1–3 days per workbook)

- You’ll receive clear project instructions, ready-to-use content, and ongoing support from our project managers.



Pay and Benefits:

- Pay per project: Approx $30 USD per workbook depending on the workload (Approx 20–60 pages)

- Average designer earnings: $500–$1,000+ per month consistently (depending on output and speed)

- Bonuses: Additional pay for exceptional quality or early delivery

- Work schedule: Flexible and fully remote

- Growth path: Opportunity to move up to Senior Designer or Design Team Lead roles

- This is stable, ongoing work — not a one-time project.

- Possibility of transitioning into part time or full time with 13th month pay and PTO



Requirements:

- Strong understanding of layout, typography, and visual hierarchy

- Experience in graphic design for print or digital documents (PDFs, eBooks, workbooks, etc.)

- Attention to detail and consistency across pages

- Reliable internet connection

- Good communication skills and ability to follow directions

- Able to meet project deadlines (typically 1–3 days per workbook)

- Experience with e-learning materials, printables, or publishing layouts is a plus.



Ideal Candidate:

You’re a great fit if:

- You take pride in clean, professional design work

- You want steady, reliable freelance income each month

- You can follow creative direction while maintaining your own design standards

- You’re dependable, responsive, and focused on quality

- We value reliability, consistency, and long-term collaboration.
