title: Digital Marketer (SEM and SMM Focused)
description:
To be considered for this role, please read every instruction on this page before submitting. This application contains specific instructions embedded throughout - submissions that don't follow them will be automatically rejected.



  - Attention to detail matters.

  - Submit the application form in full.



Education 



(1) Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Advertising, Communications, Business Administration, or a related field.

(2) Relevant certifications in digital marketing (e.g., Google Ads, Google Analytics, Meta Ads Manager) are an advantage but not required.

____



Experience



(1) 2+ years of experience in digital marketing with hands-on work in Search Engine Marketing (SEM) and Social Media Marketing (SMM).

(2) Proven experience managing paid advertising campaigns on platforms such as Google Ads, Meta Ads Manager, and other paid social channels.

(3) Experience in campaign optimization, performance tracking, and ROI analysis.

(4) Familiarity with analytics tools such as Google Analytics and reporting dashboards.

____



Requirements



Essential Skills

(1) Strong knowledge of Search Engine Marketing (SEM) and Social Media Marketing (SMM), including campaign setup, optimization, and performance analysis using Google Ads and Meta Ads Manager.

(2) Ability to analyze campaign performance and make data-driven decisions using tools such as Google Analytics.

(3) Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.

(4) Excellent written and verbal communication skills.



Highly Valued Skills

(1) Experience with A/B testing, conversion rate optimization (CRO), and audience targeting strategies.Familiarity with additional marketing tools such as SEMrush, Ahrefs, or marketing automation platforms.

(2) Familiarity with additional marketing tools such as SEMrush, Ahrefs, or marketing automation platforms.

(3) Ability to manage multiple campaigns and deadlines simultaneously.

(4) Detail-oriented with a data-driven mindset.

(5) Experience working in a digital marketing agency is a plus.



The Role

(1) You will be responsible for planning, creating, and managing paid advertising campaigns across search engines and social media platforms.

(2) This role requires strong knowledge of Search Engine Marketing (SEM) and Social Media Marketing (SMM), including campaign setup, optimization, and performance analysis using tools such as Google Ads and Meta Ads Manager.

(3) You will conduct keyword research, audience targeting, and competitor analysis to develop effective advertising strategies that improve campaign performance.

(4) You will monitor campaign performance and prepare reports using analytics tools such as Google Analytics and advertising platform dashboards.

(5) You will collaborate with the creative and content teams to develop effective ad creatives and landing pages that improve engagement and conversion rates.

(6) You will continuously optimize campaigns to improve key metrics such as CTR, conversions, and return on investment (ROI).

(7) You will stay updated on digital marketing trends, tools, and best practices to ensure campaigns remain competitive and effective.



Important

(1) Accuracy in campaign setup, tracking, and reporting is critical.

(2) You must be comfortable managing multiple campaigns simultaneously while meeting performance targets.

(3) A data-driven approach is expected when optimising campaigns and making marketing decisions.

(4) You will work as part of a broader marketing team and must communicate clearly and professionally.

_____



  READ BEFORE SUBMITTING



  To confirm you have read this job description thoroughly:

  (1) In the Strategic Thinking Statement, write the words "Data Before Assumptions."

  (2) In the Execution Approach, include the name of your favourite social media platform.



* All applications must be submitted via the form. Incomplete submissions will not be reviewed.





_____



What Happens Next:

(1) You submit the application form.

(2) We review resumes and shortlist suitable candidates.

(3) Shortlisted candidates receive a practical skills assessment.

(4) Only applicants who demonstrate strong attention to detail and successfully complete the skills assessment will move forward.

description:

,

ABOUT THE COMPANY



Growwell Funding is a U.S.-based business lending company that provides equipment financing, working capital, merchant cash advance (MCA), and business loans to small and medium-sized businesses across the United States.



We are looking for an experienced B2B Lead Generator who can generate qualified business leads through LinkedIn,
,
 outreach, YouTube, and online research.



This is a lead generation and outreach position, not just social media posting.



WORK SCHEDULE (NIGHT SHIFT – PHILIPPINES)

Monday – Friday

10:00 PM – 6:00 AM Philippine Time

(10:00 AM – 6:00 PM U.S. Eastern Time)



You must be available during these hours.



FULL-TIME / PART-TIME

Full-Time: 8 hours per day

JOB RESPONSIBILITIES

Daily tasks:



LinkedIn outreach (50–100 connections per day)

Send outreach messages

 group posting and outreach

title: Community Operations Specilist
description:
MUST SUBMIT A VIDEO INTRODUCTION TO APPLY FOR THIS POSITION. IN YOUR VIDEO, PLEASE SHARE WHO YOU ARE, YOUR EXPERIENCE, AND SPECIFICALLY HOW YOU WILL BRING VALUE TO OUR COMMUNITY, SUPPORT OUR MEMBERS, AND CONTRIBUTE TO OUR COMPANY’S GROWTH. APPLICATIONS WITHOUT A VIDEO INTRO WILL NOT BE CONSIDERED.



We are a fast-growing Digital Product Creators company dedicated to helping entrepreneurs turn their knowledge, skills, and ideas into profitable digital products using our all-in-one system powered by Go High Level. We are seeking a driven, energetic, and results-oriented Community Operations Specialist who is passionate about helping people win and thrives in a high-performance, fast-paced environment. In this role, you will be responsible for onboarding new members, delivering exceptional customer support, hosting trainings and Q&A sessions, and guiding members step-by-step as they build and launch their digital products. You will play a critical role in increasing engagement, retention, and overall community success by conducting outreach, monitoring member progress, celebrating wins, and providing hands-on coaching.



This position also includes managing support communications, assisting with certification programs, leading implementation-based trainings, and supporting revenue growth through recommending and upselling relevant products and services. From time to time, you may also be required to conduct training classes, lead workshops, or step in as a trainer to ensure our community continues to receive high-quality education and support. We are looking for someone who is confident, proactive, tech-savvy, and able to lead with both strategy and heart—someone who can motivate, educate, and hold members accountable to results. If you are excited about personal growth, digital products, and being part of a company that is scaling rapidly, this is an opportunity to grow with us. Additional details regarding responsibilities, expectations, and performance metrics will be reviewed during the interview process.

title: Brand Identity Designer
description:
Job Title: Brand Identity Designer — Part Time, Remote

About PlunkOps

PlunkOps is a Florida-based AI software company. We are launching multiple products simultaneously and need a talented brand identity designer to build our visual foundation from the ground up.



The Role

This is not a one-logo job. You will be designing the complete brand identity for a portfolio of 6 products. Each brand needs to feel cohesive as a family while having its own distinct personality. Full creative briefs are provided after selection and NDA signing.



Deliverables for Each Brand



Primary logo (wordmark and/or icon)

Color palette (primary, secondary, accent)

Typography pairing recommendation

Logo variations (light and dark versions)

One-page brand guidelines summary



What We Are Looking For



Strong portfolio showing clean modern brand identity work

Experience with tech, SaaS, or startup brands preferred

Ability to work in both dark/minimal and warm/community aesthetics

Figma or Adobe Illustrator proficiency

Good English communication — briefs and feedback via Slack

Someone who brings ideas, not just executes instructions



What We Are NOT Looking For



Clip art or template-style logos

Someone who needs a lot of hand-holding

Designers whose portfolio is mostly print or social media graphics



Engagement



Part-time, 10-20 hours per week

Rate: $6-8/hour depending on experience and portfolio

Start: As soon as possible

Communication: Slack async, feedback within 24 hours



How to Apply:

 

Share your portfolio and answer this one question: What is your design philosophy when building a brand identity for a tech company?



That answer tells us more than your resume. Full project details including brand briefs are provided after NDA signing. If your portfolio is strong you will hear back

title: Social Media Marketing Manager
description:
ABOUT THE ROLE

7 Leaves Cafe is a specialty beverage brand with 40+ locations across Southern California and other states. We are building a social media function from the ground up — and we want it built on AI.



This is not a traditional social media role. You will own the entire social media operation — strategy, content creation, scheduling, analytics, and community engagement — using Claude AI (Cowork and Claude Code) as your primary production engine. You are not managing a team of designers and copywriters. You are the operator, and AI is your team.

If you have never used AI tools to produce real marketing output at speed, this role is not for you. If you have, and you are looking for a company that will let you run, keep reading.



WHAT YOU OWN

- Full-stack social media management — across Instagram,
, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts — strategy through execution

- AI-powered content production — using Claude AI (Cowork and Code) to generate copy, campaign briefs, visual direction, content calendars, and performance reports

- Content calendar and publishing cadence — for all platforms, aligned with brand campaigns, seasonal launches, LTOs, and cultural 
nts

- Community engagement and brand voice — ensuring every interaction reflects 7 Leaves' warm, culturally rooted, community-driven identity

- Performance analytics and reporting — tracking KPIs (engagement rate, reach, follower growth, content velocity) and translating data into strategic decisions

- Platform-specific optimization — understanding what works on each channel and adapting content format, tone, and timing accordingly

- Cross-functional coordination — partnering with Operations, R&D, and Brand teams to turn business initiatives into social content



REQUIRED QUALIFICATIONS

- 3+ years managing social media for a consumer brand (food & beverage, retail, or lifestyle preferred)

- Demonstrated, hands-on experience using AI tools (Claude, ChatGPT, or equivalent) to produce marketing content — not theoretical knowledge, real output

- Proficiency with Claude AI Cowork and/or Claude Code for content workflows, or demonstrated ability to learn rapidly

- Strong visual eye — you can art-direct AI-generated content, select imagery, and ensure brand consistency without a design team

- Fluency in platform-native content creation for Instagram Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts, and

- Data-driven mindset — you make decisions based on performance metrics, not assumptions

- Excellent written communication — you can write in a brand voice that feels human, warm, and intentional

- Self-directed operator who thrives with ownership and minimal oversight



PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS

- Experience building AI-augmented workflows — prompt libraries, content templates, automated reporting pipelines

- Familiarity with Claude Projects, Claude Code CLI, or MCP (Model Context Protocol) integrations

- Experience with short-form video production (shooting, editing, or directing)

- Experience with social media management platforms (Later, Sprout Social, Hootsuite, or similar)



HOW WE MEASURE SUCCESS

First 30 Days:

- Audit existing social presence across all platforms

- Establish Claude AI content production workflow (prompts, templates, brand voice calibration)

- Deliver first AI-produced content calendar for leadership review

First 90 Days:

- Full content production pipeline operational — consistent publishing cadence across all four platforms

- Baseline KPIs established and first performance report delivered

- Cross-functional content coordination with Ops and R&D teams in rhythm

Ongoing:

- Month-over-month growth in engagement rate, follower count, and content velocity

- Measurable reduction in content production time through AI workflow optimization

- Brand voice consistency score maintained across all platforms

title: Recruitment Specialist
description:
**REMOTE RECRUITER HIGH PERFORMANCE ROLE ????**



We’re scaling fast and need a recruiter who can actually keep up.



This is not an admin role. You’ll be speaking to candidates daily, qualifying them properly, and helping us bring in high-quality people who can perform in a face-to-face sales environment.



If you’ve worked in direct sales before, you’ll understand exactly what we’re looking for.



**About Us**

We’re Synchro Sales, an Australian-based face-to-face sales company operating across multiple campaigns and locations. We care about performance, standards, and building strong teams.



The goal is to scale Synchro very quickly. Because of that, this role won’t stay as just recruitment. As we grow, this will naturally evolve into a leadership position where you’ll be training new recruiters, managing a team, and helping drive national expansion.



Your role will directly impact how fast and how well we grow.



**Your Role**

• Post and manage job ads across multiple platforms

• Call, screen, and qualify candidates daily

• Assess communication, attitude, and overall fit

• Book interviews and manage schedules

• Book in observation days and coordinate logistics

• Send onboarding
s and manage new starter communication

• Follow up contracts, document sign-offs, and compliance paperwork

• Create ID badges and assist with onboarding setup

• Keep a consistent pipeline of quality candidates

• Support admin and operations tasks where required



**Non-Negotiables**

• Exceptional English, clear, fluent, and neutral sounding

• You must sound natural on the phone, not scripted or overly accented

• Strong communication and ability to lead a conversation confidently

• Experience in face-to-face sales is essential

• Prior experience recruiting for sales or marketing roles (not office/admin roles)

• Must understand how to identify strong face-to-face sales candidates

• Highly organised and able to manage multiple applicants at once

• Reliable, proactive, and fast-moving



**Work Requirements**

• Applicants are required to have reliable high-speed internet

• Must have a noise-free working environment with no background disturbances during work hours



**This Role Is For Someone Who**

• Understands what a good salesperson looks like

• Has experience hiring for sales environments, not corporate office roles

• Can filter out weak candidates quickly

• Is confident speaking with people from different backgrounds

• Takes ownership and doesn’t need constant direction



**What You Get**

• Long-term remote role with a growing Australian company

• Stable income with performance-based upside

• Clear progression into a Recruitment Manager / leadership role

• Opportunity to build and lead your own recruitment team

• Responsibility to train, develop, and manage new recruiters

• Direct involvement in building a high-performance national team



We are very particular about who we hire for this role.

If your communication is not clear, sharp, and natural, this will not be the right fit.



If you are confident in your ability and meet the standard, apply now.

title: URGENT: Hiring "AI Influencer" Video Creator/Editor ( Veo3,HeyGen, CapCut, Veo3, ElevenLabs etc. )
description:
Please read the ENTIRE description before applying! :)



Our current candidate had to discontinue due to personal life problems so we're now ONLY looking for VERY dedicated members with experience in CapCut and other AI tools mentioned below. This opportunity is seriously much better than it sounds at first glance with a growth potential!







A few words about us:



Hey! We are Organic Media, a micro-agency creating and distributing educational and engaging AI-generated short-form videos for e-commerce brands, mainly in the pet niche.



You’ll work directly with our amazing manager ( 20 years old from Europe, with over 3 years of real experience in this exact space ), who has personally prepared step-by-step tutorials on Loom to teach you everything from the ground up.

No confusion. No guessing. No wasted time. ( Most tea
mbers learned the workflow within a few days and are now working fully independently )







What kind of videos will you create?

Simple UGC-like short-form videos fully based on the provided scripts by us ( you might just need to tweak a few words if needed ) which look realistic and feel "natural" to the viewers on platforms like YouTube Shorts, Instagram or
. Some of them are silently advertising products at the end but the key is that it doesn't sound like an ad but rather a native short-form video which a real person/influencer would record with their iPhone. There are a few styles such as just a calm "sit down" video ( where there's only one image and the influencer would just talk for 2 minutes ) or other ones where there're a few "shots" of them with a few seconds each and the scenes change but it's really not difficult at all - just a few more generations and then connecting them in CapCut.





The process is straightforward:

Getting our scripts ready and approved, using your own creativity and generating high quality base images using tools like Nano Banana Pro, turning these images into video clips using platforms like Veo3, Kling or HeyGen and for voice ElevenLabs, cuts and trimming, other minor adjustments such as background audio effects if needed ( like supermarket background audio ). Whole process is 90% just creating the right images/video clips etc, we might not even do transitions or captions so there won't be much editing skill needed. Everything is shown clearly in the training.



You’ll be creating a lot of videos a day but these are not complex edits AT ALL. Difficulty level: 6/10 ( again, 80% is just generating the rate "input" images and later just animating them with voice. That's it )





Here are visual examples of what the videos look like ( NOT OURS ):

1. 
/reel/DTty7hsAHe_/

2. 
/reel/DT0R9KgDkuW/

3. 
/reel/DSc75hsDQV6/

4. 
/reel/DT8pDFngXfp/

5. 
/reel/DUOAHm3kY7P/



( In your application, let us know your thoughts, do you think you can easily recreate them - what tools would you use and why? )





Training & onboarding ( this is the biggest advantage )

Once hired, you will receive structured video tutorials. In total, we have a few hours available, though most people don’t need all of it. The workflow is clear so no missing steps and no “figure it out yourself.”







Daily workload ( important )

You’ll create around 10 to 20+ videos per day ( 1 to 2 min long - we’ll start with a smaller amount and later increase it - won't negatively affect your monthly pay. We just want to make it easier for you to start - ultimately we'll be doing 20+ but making sure it's under 8-10h a day, at first it may take you longer and we may work harder - but once learned it easily becomes manageable ).

In reality, you'd have exactly 4 unique "AI influencers" but all of 4 them have the same scripts to use, you'd just need to change a few words to help with the context ( some of them might be talking only about "dogs" but some about "cats" so just need to change a few words to make it all make sense ) and you could use the same image prompts to generate almost identical images for each influencer. In reality it’s just 2 to 6 original videos PER INFLUENCER ( 4 of them ) and each with a very similar structure. Once trained, this is very manageable.



Your job is simple:

Create the videos, export them, and send them to us daily on 
.

That’s it. No posting. No account management. No stress.







Equipment & storage ( we make this easy )

You’ll need a good computer that can smoothly handle 1080p/light 4k video editing ( we’ll do 1080p but we’re going to work on multiple browser tabs ), a stable internet connection, and at least 16GB of RAM and 250GB+ of fast storage AVAILABLE. 1TB+ of SSD storage is preferred ( make sure it’s SSD and not old and slow HDD ).



If you need to buy storage/RAM ( for example, a 1TB SSD for around $100 ), we will refund you. This is required ONLY to save you time and speed up your workflow so you can be more efficient since it can be a couple GB of files a day ( you can later remove them after sending them to us. )



There also may be small subscription costs which you’d have to cover later if needed ( only around $10 a month ) for services like iCloud+ on iPhone/iPad or 
 Nitro - we refund those as well.







Tools & software ( HUGE upside )

You get FREE access to ALL paid tools that cost us hundreds of dollars per month, including:

- AI avatar tools like HeyGen or Veo3,

- Copywriting software like ChatGPT+, Grok or Claude,

- Editing software like CapCut PRO on Desktop,

- and our CUSTOM voice-over tools like ElevenLabs,

We provide logins, instructions, and full support.

( ALL OF THEM ARE WORTH $500+ MONTHLY )





Work environment & communication

You’ll have a private 1:1 chat with our manager and separate one to send your daily work in, work fully remotely through 
, receive clear feedback, and be treated as a long-term tea
mber, not disposable labor.

No stressful interviews. No micromanagement. No slow
s back and forth.







Responsibilities

- Adjust our scripts for the context

- Create videos from start to finish.

- Export and send them.

- Apply feedback and improve.

- Prepare scripts for the next day.

- Organize files properly.

- Communicate clearly.

- Hit deadlines without reminders.

That’s it. Simple, repetitive, and enjoyable.







This job is perfect for you if

You’re looking for long-term stability ( months or years ), you’re willing to learn, tech-savvy, creative, organized, and able to focus consistently. You already have video creation/editing experience. Already done some AI influencers related jobs and have good experience in: Google VEO3, Nano Banana Pro, HeyGen, ElevenLabs, CapCut PRO and other similar tools. Your computer can handle multiple tabs open ( A LOT of them ). You care about doing things properly, understand and speak English well, respond to messages quickly, and can work up to 6 days per week. You’re a young, talented, smart individual. You’re okay with a slightly heavier learning phase in the first week, you’re not afraid to ask questions, you’re reliable and honest about mistakes, and you either already have or can get an iPhone device ( used only for specific verification codes - refunded if needed. You can even get some used iPhone 8 for like $40 which works ).

We value dedication, reliability, and improvement more than raw talent.







This job is not for you if

You’re looking for quick money, disappear without communication, can’t focus, you’re on the older side and have never edited 1 video in your life, never played with the AI tools mentioned above, your computer can’t handle having multiple tabs open at the same time, have unstable internet, refuse feedback, rush work carelessly, avoid consistency, or cannot communicate in English.







Salary & payments

This is a full-time position, starting at 6 days per week, under 10 hours per day. ( ultimately under 8h once you become very efficient, which our manager will help you achieve and it won't impact your salary working less - quite the opposite! )



Starting salary ranges from around $440-$540/month based on experience, with the potential in the future to increase to $540+ based on a few factors such as performance, dedication, and quality of work.



Payments are monthly, in any currency or method available in your country. ( we’ll try )



To build trust, we’re offering to pay you $100 after the first week of working with us, with the remaining balance at month end. ( we already got scammed by other platforms so please respect this )



And remember, we pay $500+ dollars/month for paid tools so you can get them for FREE meaning your pay is actually 100% profit + refunds for any costs of yours. ( meaning in theory your total compensation is closer to $1000+ including tool access )







Hiring process (step-by-step)

- Please re-read this job post carefully and only then submit your application.

- In your job application, make sure to set the right title and answer every point.

- We will review it and reach out with an extra message if accepted.

- We'll send you a Google Form to fill out with contact info, etc.

- You’ll be invited to our 
 server and will get your 1:1 chat.

- You'll complete the training and take notes of it to learn everything.

- We'll give you access to all the tools and refund any required purchases.

- You'll officially start creating videos for Organic Media and get hired.

Simple and effective.







Why this is a real opportunity

No confusion, no guessing, no unpaid trials. You get real structured video training on Loom, real tools, real support, and real long-term growth - including potential promotion to coach or lead roles.

Some jobs may offer to pay more, but very few:

Teach you properly step by step, invest in you, respect your time, and give you paid tools for free.







How to apply (pay attention)

Your application title must start with the first word “ Influencer ”:

“ Influencer: (…) “

Applications without this will be ignored.





In your application, please include the following:

- Your detailed thoughts on the 5 videos linked above,

- Your past experience ( or none - that’s fine ),

- Links to any past work or simple edits,

- a detailed introduction about yourself,

- Your daily routine and availability,

- Why you want this opportunity and why we should pick you over someone else. ( why you’re special )

- and detailed answers to these 15 questions:



1. Do you have experience using CapCut on DESKTOP? How long have you been using it, and what type of videos do you usually create with it?

2. Which AI video tools have you personally used? ( For example: VEO, Kling, Nano Banana Pro, Seedream 4,5, HeyGen, Vozo, etc.) Briefly describe what you used them for.

3. When you watch short-form videos that reuse existing footage, are you able to recognize patterns such as hooks, pacing, avatar placement, and caption timing? Please explain how you notice these patterns.

4. We work with very detailed step-by-step SOPs that specify exactly which clips to use and how to assemble them. How do you typically work when instructions are extremely clear and structured?

5. If you are unsure about a task or something does not match the instructions, what do you do?

6. When generating AI videos, what are the most common problems you run into? (for example: bad lip sync, weird hands, low realism, wrong lighting, artifacts, etc.)

7. Would you say you’re more of a creative problem-solver who looks for shortcuts, loopholes, or ways around limitations, or someone who prefers to strictly follow rules and structure?

8. Have you ever had to regenerate the same AI scene or just an image multiple times to get a usable result? What usually goes wrong and how do you fix it?

9. When working with AI tools, do you prefer experimenting freely or strictly following a proven workflow? Why?

10. Tell us about your PC specs, how much RAM and Available Storage and is it a PC or laptop/Macbook. Also, do you already have an iPhone/iPad? If so, which model is it/generation?

11. Are you good at learning? Meaning if you want to learn something by for example, watching YouTube tutorials - do you usually rewatch it or take notes? Or just watch it once and try it yourself?

12. Describe exactly how you usually organize your project files when working on multiple videos at the same time.

For example: how you name folders, how you separate drafts vs finals, and how you avoid losing assets.

13. Take a look at the job post once again and find the 5 video example links we've included above. Watch all of them fully and let us know your overall thoughts, how do you think they were created - what tools would you use and why? Please cover the whole process in detail ( these aren't our videos but very similar )

14. What are your long-term plans or goals with this opportunity?

15. To confirm that you’ve read everything carefully, please tell us your favorite meal and dessert, as well as a restaurant in your country. Explain why someone from outside your country should absolutely try it. :)





Do not use ChatGPT or any AI to fully write your application. Be real, honest and detailed. We value spelling mistakes over perfect, AI generated responses. ( Yes, we can detect AI generated responses and it just isn't a good look on you )



You must also follow our Instagram: ( 
/organicxmedia )







Final note

We are hiring ONLY 1 PERSON for this role and are focused strictly on long-term relationships ( months + )

If you are dedicated, reliable, and willing to learn, this can be a very comfortable long-term position. Good luck!

title: Experienced Buyer for ecommerce company
description:
Our US-based ecommerce company is looking for a very experienced and excellent Buyer (there are positions for apparel, home décor and collectables) who is hard-working, organized, analytical, with several years of experience in ecommerce. 

It is a FULL-time position (40h/week). This is NOT an entry-level role. 



The Buyer sources new product vendors and grows the assortment offering on our brands’ sites;

oversees and maintains inventory as well as researches, analyzes, and forecasts current and future buying trends, markets, styles, and products with attention to specified target market and demographics. This role supports the curation of our product assortments, develops and maintains relationships with wholesalers and suppliers while leading negotiation of contracts with wholesalers and suppliers. 



Omni Retail Enterprises operates a lifestyle portfolio of digital storefronts and communities including home decor, apparel, collectables, fitness, and more, with millions of consumers around the globe. 



Skills & Qualifications:



• Strong English proficiency, both written and spoken. 

• 3+ years’ experience as a Buyer, preferably in apparel, home decor, or collectables

• Experience in retail and ecommerce 



Experience in Platforms:



• Proficient in Shopify, Google Analytics, and Excel. 



Work Schedule:



• Full-time position (40h/week)

• US work hours (CST)



Key Responsibilities:



• Qualifies and negotiates with vendors to find the best sales price and may include bid prices and negotiation techniques, plus review of written documents

• Acquires information concerning an item’s condition, type, rarity or value

• Prepares data for financial records: invoices, purchase orders and other related documents

• Performs financial analysis to determine savings, calculates quantity discounts and negotiates the best sales price when purchasing large quantities of goods

• Arranges payments through bank drafts or money orders to purchase items

• Maintains inventory that includes verifying inventory levels, choosing new items, returning expired items or obsolete merchandise 

• Tracks purchases, monitors vendor quality, and maintains a current database of vendor information

• Negotiates contracts with suppliers to secure favorable terms, including pricing, delivery schedules, and quality specifications

• Develops and implement purchasing strategies aligned with the company’s business goals and operational needs

• Maintains commercial contracts with clients, suppliers, and other business partners

• Researches and evaluates suppliers, considering factors such as quality, pricing, and market trends

• Analyzes market trends, ensuring the organization gets the best value for its purchases

• Implements strategies for procuring, storing, and distributing goods and services

• Oversees financial analyses related to the department’s budget 

• Manages procurement activities, including purchasing supplies and communicating company specifications to suppliers

• Ensures the company complies with legal, regulatory, and ethical requirements 

• Evaluates departmental policies and procedures to ensure alignment with industry standards and changes in law or technology

• Participates in cross-functional projects aimed at improving efficiency, profitability, quality, and customer service

• Collaborates with other senior tea
mbers to analyze potential problems impacting work

• Recommends improvements, new products, quality enhancements, or operational efficiencies

• Handles multiple projects simultaneously and prioritize tasks based on urgency

• Stays on top of trends in terms of supplement innovation and industry demand 



Resume



Please submit your information and resume detailing your relevant experience, skill set, and why you're the perfect fit for this position. Link to submit this information: 





We look forward to hearing from you!

title: Sales / Customer Service / Social Media Assistant – Rotating Shifts
description:
We are a growing flower business in the United States looking for reliable, organized, and proactive tea
mbers to help with customer service, sales, order management, and social media support.



This is a rotating shift position. We operate morning and afternoon shifts every day of the week, and schedules change weekly based on business needs. Weekend availability is required.



We receive daily retail and wholesale inquiries through phone calls, messages, Instagram,
, WhatsApp, and Shopify. You must respond quickly, communicate professionally, and help close orders.



Responsibilities:



Answer incoming calls and messages quickly

Respond to Instagram, WhatsApp, SMS, and Shopify inquiries

Help customers place orders (retail and wholesale)

Upsell products to increase order value

Enter and organize orders in our system

Follow up with missed calls and leads

Post basic content on Instagram and

Log orders handled during your shift (product, price, payment method)



During downtime:



Follow up with leads

Send messages to generate sales

Post content and update pages

Keep records clean and organized



Requirements:



Strong English speaking and writing

Sales mindset and customer service skills

Fast response time

Organized and reliable

Comfortable using online systems

Must be available on weekends



Schedule:

Morning shift: 9 AM – 3 PM CST

Afternoon shift: 3 PM – 9 PM / 10 PM CST

4–5 shifts per week (rotating schedule)



Pay:

$4–$6 per hour equivalent

Approximately $450–$650/month base

Plus performance bonuses



Important:

Performance is tracked daily. Higher performers receive more hours and bonuses.



To apply:

Send a voice recording introducing yourself and your experience with sales or customer service.

Honest and trustworthy

Good English communication

Pay:

$700–$1,000 per month

Plus performance bonuses

Accuracy is critical. All numbers are reviewed daily.

title: Virtua Assistant and Social Media Marketer
description:
You must provide a portfolio to be considered for this role. 



About the Role



We are looking for a thoughtful, detail-oriented Virtual Assistant who can support both marketing and day-to-day operations while helping us build genuine connections with women in our community.



This role goes beyond administrative support. You will be trained in lead generation, DM marketing, and content support, gaining hands-on experience in how to grow and scale a purpose-driven brand.



If you are someone who wants to learn, grow, and be part of building something meaningful, this is a strong opportunity.



Who This Is For



This role is for someone who:



Communicates with warmth, clarity, and emotional intelligence

Is eager to learn marketing, lead generation, and business systems

Can balance creativity with organization

Takes initiative and follows through consistently

Is interested in personal development, wellness, or faith-based content

Wants to grow with a small business long-term



 Core Responsibilities



1. Instagram DM Outreach & Lead Generation (Primary Focus)

Send 20–30 intentional messages per day to aligned prospects

Personalize outreach based on each person’s content and profile

Start and manage conversations that lead to event registrations

Ask engaging, low-resistance questions to build connection

Invite qualified leads to our free live workshops



2. Conversation Management & Follow-Up

Respond to messages in a timely and thoughtful manner

Follow up consistently (every 2–3 days when needed)

Engage with prospects’ content to build familiarity and trust

Track and move leads through each stage of the conversation process



 3. Calendar & Administrative Support

Manage scheduling and calendar organization

Assist with booking calls and tracking event registrations

Ensure smooth coordination for live workshops and meetings



4. Content Creation & Video Editing

Assist with editing short-form content (Reels, TikToks, Shorts)

Support posting content across platforms

Help repurpose content for consistency and reach

Maintain alignment with brand tone and messaging



 5. Tracking & Performance Reporting

Track outreach, responses, and conversions daily

Maintain simple systems to monitor performance

Provide weekly updates on lead generation and event sign-ups



 Training & Growth

You will receive training in:

DM marketing strategies

Lead generation systems

Conversation-based sales

Content marketing fundamentals



This role is designed to give you real experience in building and scaling a brand through intentional marketing.



 What We’re Looking For

Required:

Strong written communication skills

Basic familiarity with Instagram and social media platforms

Organized and detail-oriented

Reliable and consistent

Basic video editing skills (CapCut, Canva, etc.)



Preferred (but not required):

Experience with DM marketing or social media management

Familiarity with Google Sheets or tracking systems



Brand Voice Expectations

Warm, grounded, and clear

Encouraging and thoughtful

Never pushy or transactional

Focused on connection, clarity, and value



Compensation & Growth Opportunities

$3.00 Base pay (hourly)

Commission for each client who attends the live workshop

Performance-based bonuses as the business grows

Opportunity to grow into a larger role as the brand expands

title: Real Estate Acquisitions
description:
Real Estate Acquisitions Specialist (Remote)



About Us

Price Real Estate Investments is a multi-market U.S. based real estate investment company focused on acquiring off-market properties directly from homeowners. We specialize in building strong relationships with sellers, negotiating with them, and closing deals virtually. Our team is fully remote, but our impact is nationwide — and we’re growing quickly.



We’re looking for an experienced Real Estate Acquisitions Specialist to join our acquisitions team. This role is critical to our business: you’ll be speaking directly with homeowners, negotiating terms, and guiding sellers through the contract signing process. If you’ve personally made offers to sellers and closed contracts over the phone, this is an opportunity to put your skills to work in a high-energy, professional environment.



Compensation

$10/hour USD base pay



Plus Monthly Contract Bonuses for getting offers accepted:

• Bronze: 2 signed contracts = $500 bonus

• Silver: 3 signed contracts = $1,000 bonus

• Gold: 4 signed contracts = $1,500 bonus

• Platinum: 5+ signed contracts = $2,000 bonus



On-target earnings can range from $2,500–$3,500+ per month depending on performance. Pay dates are on the 1st and 15th of each month.



We believe in rewarding results. Our top performers earn meaningful bonuses based on closed contracts and consistent production.



Schedule

Full-time, Monday to Friday

9:00 AM – 6:00 PM CST

Remote position, work from your own secure setup



What You’ll Be Doing

- Engage with homeowners (seller leads), build authentic rapport, and manage conversations with professionalism

- Follow a proven acquisitions script while sounding natural and confident

- Ask strong follow-up questions to uncover seller motivation and property condition

- Make verbal offers, negotiate price and terms, and walk sellers through agreements using DocuSign

- Handle objections effectively and push deals forward toward signed contracts

- Maintain organized notes, offers, and seller updates in our CRM

- Collaborate closely with the acquisitions team and leadership



What It Takes to Succeed Here

- Relentless Follow-Up: Sellers don’t always respond the first time — or the second. You know how to stay persistent with calls, texts, and follow-ups until you get an answer. Nothing slips through the cracks on your watch.

- Extreme Attention to Detail: Every call, every note, every update gets logged correctly in the CRM. You don’t miss details, and you take pride in keeping your pipeline organized. If you’ve ever been called meticulous or “on top of everything,” this is where you’ll shine.

- Closer’s Mentality: You’re not just reading a script — you know how to listen, build rapport, and guide sellers toward a decision. You thrive on negotiation, handle objections with confidence, and create win-win agreements that get signed.

- Driven by Results: You measure success by contracts closed. You hold yourself to high standards and push to hit — and exceed — your targets consistently. You’re motivated by performance and driven by the satisfaction of closing successful deals.

- Resilient Problem-Solver: Whether it’s a tough seller, a pricing objection, or a complicated situation, you don’t freeze — you find solutions and move the deal forward. Challenges are part of the role, and you thrive in solving them under pressure.



Requirements

- Minimum 2+ years of experience in real estate acquisitions or seller negotiations

- Proven track record of closing real estate deals and securing signed contracts

- Excellent English communication skills (spoken and written)

- Confidence and professionalism on the phone; ability to build trust and rapport quickly

- Familiarity with real estate terms like ARV, repairs, inspection, contingencies, etc.

- Strong work ethic, coachability, and ability to follow scripts while sounding natural

- Proficiency with CRMs and outbound dialers

- Reliable high-speed internet, updated computer, and a quiet workspace



What We’re Looking For

- A confident, friendly, and persuasive communicator who thrives on results

- Someone who is organized, detail-oriented, and relentless in follow-up

- A professional with the drive to close contracts and grow with a fast-moving team



Why Join Us?

- Competitive pay with structured bonuses

- Real opportunities for growth in a professional investment company

- Work remotely with a team that supports your success

- A chance to close real deals, make a real impact, and develop long-term career skills in acquisitions



At Price Real Estate Investments, acquisitions is the heartbeat of our business. You’ll be in the front seat, driving growth and learning the strategies that power real deals across multiple U.S. markets.



How to Apply: (Read Carefully – Incomplete Applications Will Be Ignored)

-
 us at: 

- Subject line: Real Estate Acquisitions Application – OJPH

- Attach your resume with relevant real estate or sales experience

- Include a 1–2 minute audio or video introduction about yourself and experience.



Only applicants who follow all instructions will be considered.

 us at:

Only applicants who follow all instructions will be considered.

title: YouTube & Podcast Growth Architect (Media Operations)
description:
The Mission



We are a high-growth Health Freedom brand (A Step4Health) led by a Registered Nurse and Corporate VP. We are looking for a Media Operations specialist to transform our long-form podcast recordings into a 24/7 authority-building engine. Your goal is to own the YouTube platform and use it to drive high-intent traffic to our courses and clinical protocols.



The Sprint (First 6 Days)



The Audit: Full SEO optimization of the YouTube channel (Banner, About, Links).



Visual Podcast: Edit and post 2 full "Visual Podcast" episodes from existing Nomono recordings.



The Content Surge: Extract and schedule 10 high-conversion Shorts/Reels using Munch and Submagic.



Integration: Ensure every video description has a tracked link to our CC360 and Gumroad products.



Ongoing Responsibilities



High-Retention Editing: Use Descript to find viral hooks and Submagic for clinical-grade captions.



SEO Strategy: Research and implement keywords to rank for GLP-1, Peptides, and Medical Tourism.



Channel Management: Maintain a 100% consistent posting schedule in 
.



Authority Building: Create a "Sizzle Reel" to pitch the Founder for guest spots on major health podcasts.



Required Skills & Tools

Expert: Descript, Munch, Submagic, YouTube Studio.



Proficient: Canva (for thumbnails), 
, Course Creator 360 (GHL).



Mindset: You prioritize "Sales through Authority" over "Views for the sake of views."



This will be a base payment plus bonus payment for meeting the required metrics

title: Marketing Analytics & Tracking Specialist (Contract)
description:
Our UK based online training agency needs help with analytics and reporting on engagement and enrollments



What you’ll do



Audit tracking across:

- Website 

- Unbounce landing pages

- Enrolment forms



Fix and standardise tracking using Google Tag Manager

Ensure we can clearly track:

- Lead submissions

- Enrolments

- Source (campaign, channel, etc.)

- Validate tracking end-to-end (lead ? enrolment)



Must have strong experience with:

- Google Tag Manager

- Google Analytics 4

- Conversion tracking

- Experience with Unbounce landing pages



Able to quickly find and fix tracking issues



Deliverables

- Short audit of current tracking (what’s working / broken)

- Clean tracking setup (lead + enrolment events)

- Confirmation that data is accurate across platforms



Please ensure you include a link to your CV.



This is a short term contract to resolve the issues with our current tracking setup

title: Outbound Sales / Appointment Setter (A-Players Only)
description:
Your Role

- You will be the first point of contact for men actively looking for help. Your job is to engage leads through calls, chat, and follow-ups, qualify them properly, and book high-quality appointments for our Sales Team.

- This is high-volume outbound work, not passive inbound setting.



Requirements (Non-Negotiable)

- 1.5–2+ years experience in outbound sales or appointment setting

- Comfortable making 200+ calls per day

- Strong spoken and written English

- Calm, emotionally stable, and confident under pressure

- Able to handle conversations about porn, addiction, and sexual behavior

- Coachable and precise with scripts and frameworks

- Self-motivated and accountable

- Reliable internet and power with backup

- Experience in health, wellness, fitness, or coaching sales is a plus.



What You’ll Do Daily

- Make high-volume outbound calls to warm and cold leads

- Hold real conversations and book qualified appointments

- Follow call and chat frameworks

- Maintain clean CRM notes and activity tracking

- Hit KPIs consistently without reminders



Who You’ll Be Speaking With

- High-functioning and ambitious men

- Private, guarded, and serious once engaged

- Looking for real help, not motivation



What We Offer

- Fully remote role

- Clear scripts, KPIs, and expectations

- Training and ongoing coaching

- Consistent lead flow

- Long-term growth for top performers



About Us

- Elevated Recovery® helps high-functioning men overcome porn addiction and rebuild discipline, relationships, and sexual health. We have helped 15,000+ men over the last 14 years.



Do NOT Apply If



- You avoid volume or pressure

- You need constant motivation

- You dislike structure or accountability



How to Apply

- Send your resume and a short note explaining why this role fits you. 



Secret Code: 21



Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

title: Rockstar Customer Service
description:
???? Rockstar Customer Service & Dispatch Coordinator Needed, High Growth Role



We are not looking for a typical VA.



We are building a fast-growing service company in Florida, and we need someone who can operate at a high level, think fast, and handle real responsibility.



If you are organized, detail-oriented, and great with customers, this could turn into a long-term opportunity.





About Us:



We are Palmway Pools, a premium pool service company that services residential homes and Airbnb properties.



Our customers rely on us to keep their pools in perfect condition, especially when guests are staying at their homes.



That means communication, speed, and attention to detail matter at a very high level.







What You’ll Be Doing:



You will be the bridge between customers and our field technicians.



This is not just customer support, this is operations.



* Answer inbound calls and messages from customers

* Coordinate and dispatch technicians efficiently

* Handle scheduling, rescheduling, and urgent issues

* Communicate clearly with both customers and the field team

* Track jobs and ensure nothing falls through the cracks

* Follow up with customers to ensure satisfaction

* Keep everything organized and documented





 Tools You’ll Be Using:



* WhatsApp

* Slack

* Go High Level (GHL)



What We’re Looking For:



We are looking for someone sharp.



* Excellent English, both written and spoken

* Experience in a service-based business (home services is a big plus)

* Strong attention to detail, you catch things others miss

* Fast thinker, able to handle pressure and make decisions

* Highly organized and proactive

* Great with customers, calm, professional, and confident

* Reliable and responsive, we move fast







This Role Is NOT For You If:



* You need constant supervision

* You miss details or forget tasks

* You are slow to respond

* You struggle with handling multiple things at once





## This Role IS For You If:



* You take ownership and solve problems

* You like being busy and moving fast

* You want to grow with a company long term

* You care about doing things right the first time





 Growth Opportunity:



This is a performance-based role.



If you perform at a high level, there will be opportunities for increased pay and more responsibility over time.



We reward reliability, speed, and attention to detail.





How to Apply:



To apply, send a message with:



1. A short introduction about yourself

2. Your experience with customer service and dispatching

3. A voice recording (30 to 60 seconds) explaining why you would be a good fit

4. The word *Palmway* at the top of your application so we know you read everything





If you are sharp, organized, and ready to grow, we want to hear from you.

title: LinkedIn Outreach VA for Florida Pool Service Company
description:
LinkedIn Outreach VA for Florida Pool Service Company (Long-Term Role)



Company:

Palmway Pools — Florida’s trusted pool and spa maintenance company for residential and short-term rental properties.



About Us:

We help property managers and Airbnb operators across Pinellas County, St. Pete, Clearwater, Treasure Island, and Tampa Bay keep their pools and spas guest-ready year-round.

We’re expanding our network of Florida property managers and need a reliable, detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to handle LinkedIn outreach and lead tracking.



Position Overview:

We’re hiring a LinkedIn Outreach Virtual Assistant to connect with property managers, realtors, and vacation rental operators in Florida.

Your job is to send targeted connection requests, follow-up messages using our templates, and log all results into our tracking sheet. You’ll be the first step in our client acquisition process.



Daily Responsibilities

 Send 80–100 new LinkedIn connection requests per day using our provided filters.

 Send pre-written follow-up messages to new connections.

 Update our Google Sheet tracker with connection, message, and response data.

 Tag and notify us of interested property managers.

 Provide a short daily activity report via chat or
.



Requirements

Excellent written English (friendly and professional tone).

Strong attention to detail — accuracy is key.

Previous experience with LinkedIn outreach or lead generation.

Proficiency in Google Sheets.

Reliable internet and consistent daily availability.

Self-motivated, organized, and dependable — we’re looking for someone long-term.



Preferred (Not Required)

Experience with Expandi, Waalaxy, or GoHighLevel.

Background in real estate, property management, or hospitality.

Familiarity with Florida markets (especially Pinellas County).



Schedule & Pay



Hours: 15–40 hours per week (flexible schedule)



Pay: depending on experience





How to Apply:

Please include the following in your application:



A short intro paragraph about your LinkedIn or lead generation experience.

A screenshot of your internet speed test.

A short Loom video (1–2 minutes) introducing yourself and describing your past outreach or admin work.

Use the word “Palmway” in the subject line so we know you read the full post.



Why Join Palmway Pools

Long-term, stable work with a fast-growing Florida brand.

Simple, clear system — all scripts and instructions provided.

Bonuses for performance and reliability.

Supportive U.S.-based team that values communication and growth.

title: App Tester & Profile Creator — Social Media / Marketing Background
description:
We're building DatsMe — a personal website platform where people create

  a page around their passions and interests. Think of it like your own

  corner of the internet that you share with the people who matter.



  We're looking for 2–3 people to help us test the app by building real

  profiles and going through all the features as a genuine user would.



  What you'll do:

  - Sign up and create a personal profile on our staging site

  - Customize your page — themes, colors, photos, collections

  - Connect with other testers, message each other, try voice calls

  - Chat with the built-in AI assistant

  - Document what worked, what confused you, and what you loved



  This is NOT technical testing. We want real people who naturally

  understand how personal branding and social profiles work.



  You're a great fit if you:

  - Have experience building social media profiles or personal websites

  - Work in marketing, content creation, or social media management

  - Are naturally opinionated about what makes a profile look good

  - Can clearly express what feels right or wrong about an app



  Fixed price: $200 for 20 profile sessions with written feedback for each profile created.  

  Up to 2 rounds of work as the app improves (each round is a new contract).

title: Sales Representative
description:
Join a fast-growing US online home goods retailer and enjoy the learning and opportunities that you have while working with us.



We strive to provide 5-star service & shopping assistance to all of our clients, and all of our team is accountable to fulfill this.



We are looking for a Sales Representative who can assist prospective buyers and close online ecommerce sales.



We're only looking for full-time, long-term, ongoing cooperation.



Work schedules available:

8 AM to 4 PM US EST

4 PM to 12 AM US EST



Your work week will be 5 days per week, with 2 days off per week. Days off will be selected with your manager. We will try to accommodate your preferences for which days you like, based on availability.



This role starts ASAP!!



Job Duties and Responsibilities:

Receive incoming phone calls and live chats from potential customers (prospects) who indicated that they need shopping assistance. This does not include calls and chats from existing customers that need help with their orders (that’s a job for a different department)

Makes follow-up calls, writes follow-up
s, and text messages to potential buyers. We try to follow up 5x with each person that contacted us (unless they indicate that they are no longer interested). We don’t do cold calling. Only reaching out to prospects who interacted with our online store and left their contact information.

After each interaction with a prospect/customer, writes notes & comments in our CRM (Asana)

Communicate efficiently and build rapport with potential customers

Assists prospects in their shopping journey and helps make the purchase decision

Ensures that all prospects’ questions and objections are addressed

Leads every interaction to a close sale, which means an order is placed on our online store

Prepares custom quotes, price matches competitors if necessary, and offers custom discounts. This requires calculating margins & ensuring profitability.

Answering questions about the products we offer, including technical questions. Learns the specifications, features and benefits of our bestsellers. Over time, becomes an expert in the industry.

If not able to answer product-specific questions, conducts research in the materials provided by the supplier, or reaches out to the supplier to get the information

Confirms stock availability and lead times when offering products to prospects

Documents standard procedures and best practices in a written form, so that other tea
mbers can learn from them



Requirements:

At least 2 years of experience in sales on the phone

Experience must include both inbound and outbound sales

Excellent written and verbal English communication skills

Experience in Customer Service on the phone is a nice to have

Experience in the e-commerce (online shopping) industry is nice to have

Home improvement, construction, and gas plumbing industry experience is a plus

Outgoing, friendly, and lively

Can-do mindset, with a sense of ownership, pride in your performance, and its impact on the company’s success

Long-term commitment - treat this as your career



What we can offer:

Sales commission: 8% of gross profit from all orders closed. Gross profit means the sale amount minus the product and shipping costs. Paid monthly. No upper limit. Monthly commission payouts range between $1,200 (the guaranteed minimum) and as high as $3,000 (for the top performer). The average monthly payout is $1,465 (average from the last 2 years).

$1,200/month minimum guaranteed pay

15 days paid days off per year (also convertible to min. guaranteed commission)

Paid training on all aspects of the role

Opportunities for professional development

Friendly atmosphere

Online Interview process

Fully remote position

title: WordPress Website Manager
description:
We are seeking a skilled and dependable WordPress Website Manager to support the ongoing maintenance, updates, and performance of our website.



This role is essential to ensuring our digital presence reflects the quality, professionalism, and experience our clients expect. The ideal candidate is both technically capable and detail-oriented, with the ability to manage day-to-day website operations efficiently.



Key Responsibilities

1. Maintain and update website content, including trip pages, landing pages, and blog posts

2. Upload and format new content while ensuring consistency in design and layout

3. Manage and update WordPress plugins, ensuring compatibility and performance

4. Monitor website functionality, including links, forms, and booking integrations

5. Troubleshoot and resolve basic website issues in a timely manner

6. Optimize website pages for mobile responsiveness and user experience

7. Perform routine checks to ensure site speed and overall performance are maintained

8. Make minor design and layout updates as needed using page builders (e.g., Elementor or similar)



Qualifications

1. Proven experience managing WordPress websites

2. Familiarity with plugins, themes, and page builders

3. Strong attention to detail and organization

4. Ability to work independently and meet deadlines

5. Basic understanding of website performance, speed, and troubleshooting



How to Apply (READ CAREFULLY)

To be considered for this position, all applicants must follow the instructions below:



1. Include the word “Let Sparks Fly WP” in the subject line of your application (Applications without this will not be reviewed)

2. Submit 2–3 WordPress websites you have worked on

3. Record a 1–2 minute video explaining: Why you are a strong fit for this role and your experience managing WordPress websites

title: Podcast Production & Promotion Assistant
description:
Job Title: Podcast Production & Promotion Assistant



Job Description:

We are looking for a reliable and creative Podcast Production & Promotion Assistant to support our growing podcast. This role involves both behind-the-scenes production work and helping expand our audience reach.



Responsibilities:



* Assist with editing podcast episodes (audio and video)

* Create engaging short-form content (reels/clips) to promote episodes

* Help manage the guest pipeline (scheduling, tracking, and coordination)

* Support podcast recording sessions

* Communicate with guests before and after recordings

* Develop and suggest strategies to promote episodes and increase views



Requirements:



* Basic experience with audio/video editing tools

* Familiarity with social media platforms (Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, etc.)

* Strong communication and organizational skills

* Ability to meet deadlines and manage multiple tasks

* Creative mindset for content promotion



Nice to Have:



* Experience working with podcasts or content creators

* Knowledge of audience growth strategies



Work Setup:

* Remote / Flexible



If you're passionate about podcasts and content creation, we'd love to hear from you!

title: Google Business Profile (GBP) Reinstatement Expert
description:
About the Role

We are a fast-growing US-based agency specializing in Business Continuity. We help contractors recover suspended Google Business Profiles.



We’re looking for a Reinstatement Ninja who understands Google’s “black box” and can build strong cases to get listings back online.



Key Responsibilities:

• Analyze GBP suspensions (soft & hard) and identify root causes

• Build professional appeal dossiers (licenses, bills, tax docs)

• Write and submit high-quality reinstatement appeals

•Follow up with Google Support until resolution

• Assist with video verification prep (team/client coordination)

•Fix compliance issues to keep profiles live



Requirements (Must-Have)

• Proven experience reinstating Google Business Profiles

• Strong understanding of Google violations (e.g. deceptive content, quality issues)

• High attention to detail (data consistency, addresses, etc.)

• Persistent and solution-oriented mindset

• Excellent written English (professional communication)

• Comfortable with Google Drive, Loom, and basic EXIF/photo data



Why Join Us?

• Base salary + $50–$100 bonus per successful reinstatement

• Flexible schedule

• Growth opportunity ? potential to lead operations



How to Apply

Start your application with “REINSTATED” and include:

• The most difficult GBP suspension you’ve fixed

• Your success rate with hard suspensions

• A portfolio link or proof of a recent “Live” reinstatement

title: OMG!! NEEDED NOW!! Awesome WordPress Designer – Landing Page Designer – Fast Growing Marketing CANADIAN Company
description:
Hey there!



I'm looking for an Experienced WordPress Designer with excellent written English to create engaging, high-converting landing pages for our marketing campaigns.



In the beginning, this is an on-call/part-time job, but it can grow into a full-time role where you'll handle more significant clients if you prove to be a great fit.



Watch this video to learn more about how our agency works and to also see my personality and style:


/share/b301319feb524d55acb8eacb631cb7c1?sid=b843a7e2-95d
a0-51b42598f74f



ABOUT YOU:

Great communicator in writing

Won't be easily offended

Extremely reliable

Positive, no-excuse attitude!



KNOWLEDGE REQUIRED:

Expertise in WordPress and Elementor for building custom landing pages

Solid understanding of landing page design principles for conversion optimization (CRO)

Ability to create responsive landing pages that look great on any device

Experience with integrating third-party form plugins (e.g., WPForms, Gravity Forms) for lead capture

Familiarity with integrating
 marketing tools (e.g., Mailchimp, ActiveCampaign) for form submissions

Basic knowledge of SEO for optimizing landing pages for search engines

Understanding of A/B testing and data-driven decisions for landing page performance improvement

Experience with visual design tools (e.g., Photoshop, Figma) is a plus



ABOUT ME (Alex):

I'm a CEO with over 15 years of experience in digital marketing

I move very fast & expect the people I work with to be the same way

I'm very loyal to my employees & treat them with respect

I ALWAYS give bonuses for doing a good job (if I make money, you should be rewarded for that)

I run the company remotely and am located in Indonesia



ABOUT THE POSITION:

We need a WordPress Elementor Designer who can create beautiful, functional, and high-converting landing pages. You’ll integrate lead capture forms, design eye-catching layouts, and apply conversion best practices to help our clients achieve their marketing goals.



ABOUT THE COMPENSATION:

We offer DAILY PAYMENTS on a task-by-task basis through WISE, ensuring timely and efficient compensation for your work.

We pay bonuses for great work – We reward results. This job is about providing value.

13th-month bonus for candidates who qualify for a full-time position, which includes landing page optimization and advanced Elementor skills.



HOW TO APPLY:

Send an
 with the exact subject line: Awesome WordPress Designer

Include your resume



Congratulations! You made it to the end, so what are you waiting for?



Please
 me at:

title: Inventory Data & Listings Coordinator (Ecommerce)
description:
We are a growing e-commerce company selling on Amazon, Walmart, and eBay (FBA & FBM).



We are looking for someone to manage and maintain our product data across systems — not just enter data, but understand it and keep it accurate.



What You’ll Do:

Enter and maintain product data in our Salesforce system

Ensure all items match our master Excel list and website portal

Verify SKUs, bundles/kits, and components are set up correctly

Confirm correct barcodes (UPC/FNSKU) are attached to each item

Cross-check listings across Amazon, Walmart, and eBay

Identify and fix mismatches or missing information



What We’re Looking For:

Strong attention to detail

Experience with ecommerce platforms or inventory systems

Understanding of SKUs, barcodes, and product bundles (kitting)

Comfortable working with Excel

Someone who thinks and asks questions — not just follows instructions



Important:

This is NOT basic data entry.

We need someone who understands how products, inventory, and listings connect.



Details:

Remote / US EST hours preferred

Full-time or part-time (flexible based on experience)



If you are organized, detail-driven, and enjoy making systems clean and accurate, we’d love to hear from you

title: Client Success Manager (Google Ads Agency)
description:
Role focus:

Client communication, delivery coordination, follow-up enforcement, and internal accountability across Google Ads clients. This is an embedded operator role. You are not a consultant. You are not here to redesign the agency. You are here to ensure promises turn into execution and clients feel supported, without the founder needing to chase.

Who you will work with:

You will work directly with the Founder, the Head of Google Ads, media buyers, the operations team, and the technical team. Most communication is in Slack. Project tracking is in 
.



Core outcomes of the role:

- Clients feel consistently supported, informed, and confident.

- Nothing discussed on calls gets forgotten.

- Tasks are assigned with owners and deadlines in 
.

- Follow-ups happen automatically through process, not micromanagement.

- Delivery stays on track and delays are surfaced early.



Primary responsibilities:

A. Client communication ownership

- Be present on all client calls (monthly by default, sometimes weekly).

- Take structured notes or review Fireflies notes and convert them into clear action items.

- Manage ongoing Slack-based client communication: acknowledge messages, clarify requests, and ensure they are routed to the right owner.

- Maintain a professional, calm, polished client presence.

- Ensure clients receive updates on progress without needing to chase.



B. Project and delivery coordination

- Convert every call into a 
 task list with clear owners and realistic deadlines.

- Work with media buyers to confirm timelines, then lock deadlines in Monday.

- Track progress daily through Monday and Slack.

- Ensure tasks are completed to standard and on time, or surfaced early if blocked.

- Maintain a clean delivery record per client (what was requested, what was done, what is pending).



C. Follow-up and accountability

- Follow up on overdue tasks by first pinging the correct stakeholder in the internal Slack channel.

- If issues persist, escalate patterns to leadership during your weekly check-in.

- Your job is not to pressure people; your job is to ensure visibility and follow-through through a clear system.



D. Internal operating rhythm

Daily: monitor client channels, ensure new tasks are created, confirm owners and next steps.

Weekly: prepare a short internal delivery summary for leadership and the Head of Google Ads (what moved, what’s stuck, what needs attention).

Monthly: support QBR/SBR scheduling, ensure agenda items are captured, and make sure action items are executed post-call.



Non-negotiable skills and expectations:

- Strong written and spoken English (client-facing).

- High follow-up discipline and strong organisational skills.

- Strong judgment under ambiguity: you can interpret client requests and translate them into internal tasks.

- You are fast, calm under pressure, and proactive without being chaotic.

- 
 proficiency is required. Slack proficiency is required.

- You can learn and use Google Ads language well enough to follow calls and communicate accurately, even if you are not the media buyer.



You operate with ownership: if something is unclear, you clarify it; if something is blocked, you surface it early.





Tools you will use:

Slack, 
, Google Drive, Fireflies, Google Docs, Looker Studio (viewing reports), basic Google Ads familiarity (view-only context).



Ideal background:

- Account manager, customer success manager, delivery coordinator, project manager in a marketing agency environment.



- Experience working with performance marketing teams (Google Ads preferred).

And understanding



- Comfortable with fast-paced teams and remote collaboration across time zones.





Preferred hiring regions

Georgia, South Africa, Philippines (high level only)



Trial period:

Paid trial period. You will be assessed on responsiveness, follow-through, clarity, and ability to keep delivery moving without chaos.



How to apply -

Send:

A short intro



Examples of client-facing or delivery roles you’ve held



Any Google Ads Agency experience



The tools you’ve used (especially Monday and Slack)



A short Loom (optional but preferred) explaining how you manage client follow-up and prevent tasks from slipping

title: Klaviyo Lifecycle Specialist (Flows, Logic & Performance)
description:
About EMK Skincare



EMK is a luxury biotech skincare brand rooted in clinical performance and plant-based biotechnology. Our formulas are powered by AgaveFlora-V™, a proprietary bio-signaling complex designed to support skin renewal, resilience, and long-term skin health.



Our marketing approach is education-led, ritual-based, and performance-driven — not aggressive or discount-focused.



Role Overview



We are hiring a Klaviyo Lifecycle Specialist to take ownership of our
 performance.



This role focuses on optimizing flows, improving logic, and driving measurable results — not just building
s.



You will work within an established marketing system and improve it through better segmentation, testing, and lifecycle strategy.



What You Will Own



You will be responsible for improving:



Flow performance and revenue

 engagement and conversion

Repeat purchase behavior

Overall lifecycle effectiveness



This is a performance-driven role with real ownership.



Key Responsibilities



1. Flow Optimization (Immediate Priority)



Improve existing flows using:

conditional splits

segmentation

timing optimization

Focus on performance improvement, not rebuilding from scratch



2. A/B Testing (Weekly Execution)



Run ongoing A/B tests across flows and campaigns

Test subject lines, messaging structure, timing, and segmentation

Track results and apply learnings



3. Flow Expansion & Cleanup



Review additional flows and identify opportunities

Improve or rebuild based on performance gaps

Prioritize based on revenue impact



4. Campaign Support (Selective)



Improve segmentation and targeting for campaigns

Support execution when needed (not primary focus)



5. Reporting & Insights



Provide weekly performance updates

Clearly communicate:

what improved

what did not work

what will be tested next

How We Work

You will focus on performance, logic, and testing

Copy and brand voice are handled by our internal copy team

Creative assets are provided when needed

You will work closely with our team but have independent ownership of your work



Requirements

3+ years experience with Klaviyo

Strong experience building and optimizing
 flows

Experience with segmentation and lifecycle marketing

Experience running A/B tests

Strong attention to detail and organization

Ability to think critically and improve systems (not just follow instructions)

Important



This role is NOT:



a copywriting role

a design role

a social media role

a discount-driven marketing role



We are a luxury skincare brand and require a more thoughtful, customer-aware approach.



Performance & Growth Opportunity



This role starts as part-time but is designed to grow.



As you improve performance, there is opportunity for:



increased hours

higher compensation

expanded ownership



You will play a key role in building a core revenue channel for the brand.





Compensation & Hours

Hourly Rate: $10–$14/hour (based on experience)

Schedule: 20 hours per week



This role follows a consistent daily schedule of approximately 4 hours per day, 5 days per week.



We require:



2–3 hours of overlap daily with our team for communication

reliable, consistent availability during agreed working hours



This structure allows for:



faster execution

consistent progress

ongoing optimization and testing



As performance improves, there is opportunity for:



increased hours

higher compensation

expanded ownership



We are looking for someone interested in a long-term role with growth potential.



Holidays & Schedule



We observe Philippine holidays.



If a holiday falls within the work week, hours may be flexibly redistributed across other working days to maintain overall weekly hours and ensure continuity of work.



We value both consistency and balance, and aim to support a sustainable long-term working relationship.







To Apply



Please include:



Examples of flows you have improved or optimized

A short explanation of how you approach lifecycle
 marketing

How you would improve an existing skincare
 flow
